results.question: Among the customers who paid in euro, how many of them have a monthly consumption of over 1000?
results.sql: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM yearmonth AS T1 INNER JOIN customers AS T2 ON T1.CustomerID = T2.CustomerID WHERE T2.Currency = 'EUR' AND T1.Consumption > 1000.00

results.question: How many times the circuits were held in Austria? Please give their location and coordinates.
results.sql: SELECT DISTINCT location, lat, lng FROM circuits WHERE country = 'Austria'

results.question: What is the eyes colour of Abraham Sapien?
results.sql: SELECT T2.colour FROM superhero AS T1 INNER JOIN colour AS T2 ON T1.eye_colour_id = T2.id WHERE T1.full_name = 'Abraham Sapien'

results.question: Indicates the number of cards with pre-modern format, ruling text "This is a triggered mana ability." that do not have multiple faces.

output_properties.property_name: unique id number identifying the cards

results.sql: SELECT COUNT(T1.id) FROM cards AS T1 INNER JOIN legalities AS T2 ON T1.uuid = T2.uuid INNER JOIN rulings AS T3 ON T1.uuid = T3.uuid WHERE T2.format = 'premodern' AND T3.text = 'This is a triggered mana ability.' AND T1.Side IS NULL

results.question: How many patients who were female got white blood cells that were below 3.5?
results.sql: SELECT COUNT(T1.ID) FROM Patient AS T1 INNER JOIN Laboratory AS T2 ON T1.ID = T2.ID WHERE T2.WBC < 3.5 AND T1.SEX = 'F'

results.question: Please list the websites where I can purchase the cards that have the promotional type of "bundle".
results.sql: SELECT DISTINCT purchaseUrls FROM cards WHERE promoTypes = 'bundle'

results.question: Which constructor scored most points from Monaco Grand Prix between 1980 and 2010? List the score, name and nationality of this team.

additional_collections.role: filters for Monaco Grand Prix and year range
filters for Monaco Grand Prix and year range

results.sql: SELECT SUM(T1.points), T2.name, T2.nationality FROM constructorResults AS T1 INNER JOIN constructors AS T2 ON T1.constructorId = T2.constructorId INNER JOIN races AS T3 ON T3.raceid = T1.raceid WHERE T3.name = 'Monaco Grand Prix' AND T3.year BETWEEN 1980 AND 2010 GROUP BY T2.name ORDER BY SUM(T1.points) DESC LIMIT 1

results.question: Find art pieces with a currentValuation greater than 1,000,000.
How many more "discount" gas stations does the Czech Republic have compared to Slovakia?
results.sql: SELECT SUM(IIF(Country = 'CZE', 1, 0)) - SUM(IIF(Country = 'SVK', 1, 0)) FROM gasstations WHERE Segment = 'Discount'

results.question: For the patients with an abnormal Ig M level, what is the most common disease they are diagnosed with?
results.sql: SELECT T1.Diagnosis FROM Patient AS T1 INNER JOIN Laboratory AS T2 ON T1.ID = T2.ID WHERE T2.IGM NOT BETWEEN 40 AND 400 GROUP BY T1.Diagnosis ORDER BY COUNT(T1.Diagnosis) DESC LIMIT 1

results.question: Identify the weakest attribute of the Black Panther.

additional_collections.role: provides attribute names for mapping attribute_id
provides attribute names for mapping attribute_id

results.sql: SELECT T3.attribute_name FROM superhero AS T1 INNER JOIN hero_attribute AS T2 ON T1.id = T2.hero_id INNER JOIN attribute AS T3 ON T2.attribute_id = T3.id WHERE T1.superhero_name = 'Black Panther' ORDER BY T2.attribute_value ASC LIMIT 1

results.question: For the earliest customer, what segment did he/she have?
results.sql: SELECT T2.Segment FROM transactions_1k AS T1 INNER JOIN customers AS T2 ON T1.CustomerID = T2.CustomerID ORDER BY Date ASC LIMIT 1

results.question: Find art pieces where the artPieceName contains the word 'Starry'.
Write the full name of the member who spent money for water, veggie tray and supplies and include the cost of it.
results.sql: SELECT T2.first_name, T2.last_name, T1.cost FROM expense AS T1 INNER JOIN member AS T2 ON T1.link_to_member = T2.member_id WHERE T1.expense_description = 'Water, Veggie tray, supplies'

results.question: How many chemical compounds in the database are identified as carcinogenic.
results.sql: SELECT COUNT(T.molecule_id) FROM molecule AS T WHERE T.label = '+'

results.question: For patient with albumin level lower than 3.5, list their ID, sex and diagnosis.
results.sql: SELECT DISTINCT T1.ID, T1.SEX, T1.Diagnosis FROM Patient AS T1 INNER JOIN Laboratory AS T2 ON T1.ID = T2.ID WHERE T2.ALB < 3.5

results.question: Find clinics that offer family healthcare services using semantic search, and are accepting new patients. Count the number of unique clinics and group them by average patient satisfaction score.
Who are the female account holders who own credit cards and also have loans?
results.sql: SELECT T1.client_id FROM client AS T1 INNER JOIN disp AS T2 ON T1.client_id = T2.client_id INNER JOIN account AS T5 ON T2.account_id = T5.account_id INNER JOIN loan AS T3 ON T5.account_id = T3.account_id INNER JOIN card AS T4 ON T2.disp_id = T4.disp_id WHERE T1.gender = 'F'

results.question: How many cards are oversized, reprinted, and printed for promotions?

output_properties.property_name: unique id number identifying the cards

results.sql: SELECT COUNT(id) FROM cards WHERE isOversized = 1 AND isReprint = 1 AND isPromo = 1

results.question: Which LAM customer used the Euro as their currency and had the highest consumption in October 2013?
results.sql: SELECT T1.CustomerID FROM customers AS T1 INNER JOIN yearmonth AS T2 ON T1.CustomerID = T2.CustomerID WHERE T1.Segment = 'LAM' AND T2.Date = '201310' AND T1.Currency = 'EUR' GROUP BY T1.CustomerID ORDER BY SUM(T2.Consumption) DESC LIMIT 1

results.question: Find courses with a courseDescription that covers the entire data science lifecycle, including data collection, processing, analysis, and presentation.

What is the difference of the average ball control score between Abdou Diallo and Aaron Appindangoye
?
results.sql: SELECT CAST(SUM(CASE WHEN t1.player_name = 'Abdou Diallo' THEN t2.ball_control ELSE 0 END) AS REAL) / COUNT(CASE WHEN t1.player_name = 'Abdou Diallo' THEN t2.id ELSE NULL END) - CAST(SUM(CASE WHEN t1.player_name = 'Aaron Appindangoye' THEN t2.ball_control ELSE 0 END) AS REAL) / COUNT(CASE WHEN t1.player_name = 'Aaron Appindangoye' THEN t2.id ELSE NULL END) FROM Player AS t1 INNER JOIN Player_Attributes AS t2 ON t1.player_api_id = t2.player_api_id

results.question: What are the valid e-mail addresses of the administrator of the school located in the San Bernardino county, City of San Bernardino City Unified that opened between 1/1/2009 to 12/31/2010 whose school types are public Intermediate/Middle Schools and Unified Schools?
results.sql: SELECT T2.AdmEmail1, T2.AdmEmail2 FROM frpm AS T1 INNER JOIN schools AS T2 ON T1.CDSCode = T2.CDSCode WHERE T2.County = 'San Bernardino' AND T2.City = 'San Bernardino' AND T2.DOC = 54 AND strftime('%Y', T2.OpenDate) BETWEEN '2009' AND '2010' AND T2.SOC = 62

results.question: Identify the most common cuisine type among all restaurants that are currently open (using 'openNow' property for filtering and 'description' property for text aggregation).
What is the total amount of money spent for food?
results.sql: SELECT SUM(spent) FROM budget WHERE category = 'Food'

results.question: What was the average time in milliseconds Lewis Hamilton spent at a pit stop during Formula_1 races?
results.sql: SELECT AVG(milliseconds) FROM pitStops AS T1 INNER JOIN drivers AS T2 on T1.driverId = T2.driverId WHERE T2.forename = 'Lewis' AND T2.surname = 'Hamilton'

results.question: For the year that concluded on December 31, 1998, how many male patients on average were tested in the lab each month?
results.sql: SELECT CAST(COUNT(T1.ID) AS REAL) / 12 FROM Patient AS T1 INNER JOIN Laboratory AS T2 ON T1.ID = T2.ID WHERE STRFTIME('%Y', T2.Date) = '1998' AND T1.SEX = 'M'

results.question: What is the average monthly number of links created in 2010 for posts that have no more than 2 answers?
results.sql: SELECT CAST(COUNT(T1.Id) AS REAL) / 12 FROM postLinks AS T1 INNER JOIN posts AS T2 ON T1.PostId = T2.Id WHERE T2.AnswerCount <= 2 AND STRFTIME('%Y', T1.CreationDate) = '2010'

results.question: Which year was the first Singapore Grand Prix?
results.sql: SELECT year FROM races WHERE name = 'Singapore Grand Prix' ORDER BY year ASC LIMIT 1

results.question: Which post by slashnick has the most answers count? State the post ID.
results.sql: SELECT T2.PostId FROM users AS T1 INNER JOIN postHistory AS T2 ON T1.Id = T2.UserId INNER JOIN posts AS T3 ON T2.PostId = T3.Id WHERE T1.DisplayName = 'slashnick' ORDER BY T3.AnswerCount DESC LIMIT 1

results.question: Provide all ID, sex and birthday of patients whose urea nitrogen (UN) just within the borderline of passing?
results.sql: SELECT DISTINCT T1.ID, T1.SEX, T1.Birthday FROM Patient AS T1 INNER JOIN Laboratory AS T2 ON T1.ID = T2.ID WHERE T2.UN = 29

results.question: Find courses where the courseTitle contains 'Advanced' and calculate the percentage of these that are currentlyEnrolling.
List out the full name and total cost that member id "rec4BLdZHS2Blfp4v" incurred?
results.sql: SELECT T1.first_name, T1.last_name, SUM(T2.cost) FROM member AS T1 INNER JOIN expense AS T2 ON T1.member_id = T2.link_to_member WHERE T1.member_id = 'rec4BLdZHS2Blfp4v'

results.question: What is the educational level name for the schools with Breakfast Provision 2 in county code 37? Indicate the name of the school.
results.sql: SELECT T2.EILName, T2.School FROM frpm AS T1 INNER JOIN schools AS T2 ON T1.CDSCode = T2.CDSCode WHERE T1.`NSLP Provision Status` = 'Breakfast Provision 2' AND T1.`County Code` = 37

results.question: Provide the badge names received in 2011 for the user whose location is in the North Pole.
results.sql: SELECT T2.Name FROM users AS T1 INNER JOIN badges AS T2 ON T1.Id = T2.UserId WHERE STRFTIME('%Y', T2.Date) = '2011' AND T1.Location = 'North Pole'

results.question: What is the average number of badges obtained by a user with over 200 views?
results.sql: SELECT CAST(COUNT(T1.Id) AS REAL) / COUNT(DISTINCT T2.DisplayName) FROM badges AS T1 INNER JOIN users AS T2 ON T1.UserId = T2.Id WHERE T2.Views > 200

results.question: For museums that are currently open, calculate the average entry fee grouped by the name of the museum.
List the card names with value that cost more converted mana for the face.
results.sql: SELECT name FROM cards ORDER BY faceConvertedManaCost LIMIT 1

results.question: What are the websites for all the partially virtual chartered schools located in San Joaquin?
results.sql: SELECT Website FROM schools WHERE County = 'San Joaquin' AND Virtual = 'P' AND Charter = 1

results.question: State the name of major that Phillip Cullen has joined.
results.sql: SELECT T1.major_name FROM major AS T1 INNER JOIN member AS T2 ON T1.major_id = T2.link_to_major WHERE T2.first_name = 'Phillip' AND T2.last_name = 'Cullen'

results.question: State the chance creation passing class for "PEC Zwolle" on 2013/9/20.
results.sql: SELECT t2.chanceCreationPassingClass FROM Team AS t1 INNER JOIN Team_Attributes AS t2 ON t1.team_api_id = t2.team_api_id WHERE t1.team_long_name = 'PEC Zwolle' AND SUBSTR(t2.`date`, 1, 10) = '2013-09-20'

results.question: Among the players whose preferred foot was the left foot when attacking, how many of them would remain in his position when the team attacked?
results.sql: SELECT COUNT(player_api_id) FROM Player_Attributes WHERE preferred_foot = 'left' AND attacking_work_rate = 'low'

results.question: How many users with more than 10 views created their account after the year 2013?
results.sql: SELECT COUNT(id) FROM users WHERE STRFTIME('%Y', CreationDate) > '2013' AND Views > 10

results.question: How many credit card withdrawals were recorded after 1995?
results.sql: SELECT COUNT(account_id) FROM trans WHERE STRFTIME('%Y', date) > '1995' AND operation = 'VYBER KARTOU'

results.question: What is the passing class of CLB team?
results.sql: SELECT DISTINCT t2.buildUpPlayPassingClass FROM Team AS t1 INNER JOIN Team_Attributes AS t2 ON t1.team_api_id = t2.team_api_id WHERE t1.team_short_name = 'CLB'

results.question: List all patients with their sex and date of birthday, whose AST glutamic oxaloacetic transaminase (GOT) index is within normal range for loboratory examination in 1994.
results.sql: SELECT DISTINCT T1.SEX, T1.Birthday FROM Patient AS T1 INNER JOIN Laboratory AS T2 ON T1.ID = T2.ID WHERE T2.GOT < 60 AND STRFTIME('%Y', T2.Date) = '1994'

results.question: Give the name of the league with the highest matches of all time and how many matches were played in the said league.
results.sql: SELECT t2.name, t1.max_count FROM League AS t2 JOIN (SELECT league_id, MAX(cnt) AS max_count FROM (SELECT league_id, COUNT(id) AS cnt FROM Match GROUP BY league_id) AS subquery) AS t1 ON t1.league_id = t2.id

results.question: List the city and state of members enrolled under electrical and computer engineering department.
results.sql: SELECT city, state FROM member AS T1 INNER JOIN major AS T2 ON T2.major_id = T1.link_to_major INNER JOIN zip_code AS T3 ON T3.zip_code = T1.zip WHERE department = 'Electrical and Computer Engineering Department' AND position = 'Member'

results.question: What is the phone number and extension number for the school that had the 333rd highest average writing score?

additional_collections.role: provides average writing scores for ordering
provides average writing scores for ordering

results.sql: SELECT T2.Phone, T2.Ext FROM satscores AS T1 INNER JOIN schools AS T2 ON T1.cds = T2.CDSCode ORDER BY T1.AvgScrWrite DESC LIMIT 332, 1

results.question: What was the overall rating for Aaron Mooy on 2016/2/4?
results.sql: SELECT t2.overall_rating FROM Player AS t1 INNER JOIN Player_Attributes AS t2 ON t1.player_api_id = t2.player_api_id WHERE SUBSTR(t2.`date`, 1, 10) = '2016-02-04' AND t1.player_name = 'Aaron Mooy'

results.question: Find clinics specialized in cardiovascular healthcare by searching "description"; filter these to only show clinics with an "averagePatientSatisfaction" greater than 4.5; determine the percentage of these clinics "acceptingNewPatients"; and finally, organize the results by "clinicName".
Find the race of the superhero who weighs 108kg and is 188cm tall.
results.sql: SELECT DISTINCT T2.race FROM superhero AS T1 INNER JOIN race AS T2 ON T1.race_id = T2.id WHERE T1.weight_kg = 108 AND T1.height_cm = 188

results.question: What is the biggest amount of transaction that the client whose card was opened in 1996/10/21 made?

additional_collections.role: holds card issuance date to filter by
holds card issuance date to filter by

results.sql: SELECT T4.amount FROM card AS T1 JOIN disp AS T2 ON T1.disp_id = T2.disp_id JOIN account AS T3 on T2.account_id = T3.account_id JOIN trans AS T4 on T3.account_id = T4.account_id WHERE T1.issued = '1996-10-21' ORDER BY T4.amount DESC LIMIT 1

results.question: Which type of label is the most numerous in atoms with hydrogen?

additional_collections.role: holds element and molecule_id for filtering
holds element and molecule_id for filtering

results.sql: SELECT T.label FROM ( SELECT T2.label, COUNT(T2.molecule_id) FROM atom AS T1 INNER JOIN molecule AS T2 ON T1.molecule_id = T2.molecule_id WHERE T1.element = 'h' GROUP BY T2.label ORDER BY COUNT(T2.molecule_id) DESC LIMIT 1 ) t

results.question: Find reservations where the partySize is greater than 4, group the results by reservationName, and calculate the average partySize for each reservationName group.

How many matches were held in the league Germany 1. Bundesliga
from August to October 2008?
results.sql: SELECT COUNT(t2.id) FROM League AS t1 INNER JOIN Match AS t2 ON t1.id = t2.league_id WHERE t1.name = 'Germany 1. Bundesliga' AND SUBSTR(t2.`date`, 1, 7) BETWEEN '2008-08' AND '2008-10'

results.question: Which hero was the fastest?
results.sql: SELECT T1.superhero_name FROM superhero AS T1 INNER JOIN hero_attribute AS T2 ON T1.id = T2.hero_id INNER JOIN attribute AS T3 ON T2.attribute_id = T3.id WHERE T3.attribute_name = 'Speed' ORDER BY T2.attribute_value DESC LIMIT 1

results.question: Identify superheroes who can control wind and list their names in alphabetical order.
results.sql: SELECT T1.superhero_name FROM superhero AS T1 INNER JOIN hero_power AS T2 ON T1.id = T2.hero_id INNER JOIN superpower AS T3 ON T2.power_id = T3.id WHERE T3.power_name = 'Wind Control' ORDER BY T1.superhero_name

results.question: For the set which had 'SS2' as the code, what is its magic card market id?
results.sql: SELECT mcmId FROM sets WHERE code = 'SS2'

results.question: List out the set name of the set code "ALL".
results.sql: SELECT name FROM sets WHERE code = 'ALL'

results.question: Show me courses that cover 'machine learning fundamentals' in their descriptions and have the word 'Advanced' in the course title.
What is the average fastest lap time of the top 10 drivers in the 2006 United States Grand Prix?

additional_collections.role: filters by race name and year
filters by race name and year

results.sql: SELECT AVG(T1.fastestLapTime) FROM results AS T1 INNER JOIN races AS T2 on T1.raceId = T2.raceId WHERE T1.rank < 11 AND T2.year = 2006 AND T2.name = 'United States Grand Prix'

results.question: Which post has the highest score? Please give its id and title's name.
results.sql: SELECT T1.Id, T2.Title FROM users AS T1 INNER JOIN posts AS T2 ON T1.Id = T2.OwnerUserId ORDER BY T2.Score DESC LIMIT 1

results.question: Name the ID and age of patient with two or more laboratory examinations which show their hematoclit level exceeded the normal range.
results.sql: SELECT DISTINCT T1.ID, STRFTIME('%Y', CURRENT_TIMESTAMP) - STRFTIME('%Y', T1.Birthday) FROM Patient AS T1 INNER JOIN Laboratory AS T2 ON T1.ID = T2.ID WHERE T1.ID IN ( SELECT ID FROM Laboratory WHERE HCT >= 52 GROUP BY ID HAVING COUNT(ID) >= 2 )

results.question: What is the race of the superhero with maximum attribute value?

additional_collections.role: holds attribute names to identify the maximum attribute
contains attribute values for finding maximum
links heroes to their attributes and races
holds attribute names to identify the maximum attribute
contains attribute values for finding maximum
links heroes to their attributes and races

results.sql: SELECT T3.race FROM superhero AS T1 INNER JOIN hero_attribute AS T2 ON T1.id = T2.hero_id INNER JOIN race AS T3 ON T1.race_id = T3.id ORDER BY T2.attribute_value DESC LIMIT 1

results.question: How many cards of legalities whose status is restricted have text boxes?
results.sql: SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT T1.id) FROM cards AS T1 INNER JOIN legalities AS T2 ON T1.uuid = T2.uuid WHERE T2.status = 'Restricted' AND T1.isTextless = 0

results.question: What is the superpowers of the superhero has Helen Parr as their full name?
results.sql: SELECT T3.power_name FROM superhero AS T1 INNER JOIN hero_power AS T2 ON T1.id = T2.hero_id INNER JOIN superpower AS T3 ON T2.power_id = T3.id WHERE T1.full_name = 'Helen Parr'

results.question: Who are the account holder identification numbers whose who have transactions on the credit card with the amount is less than the average, in 1998?
results.sql: SELECT T1.account_id FROM trans AS T1 INNER JOIN account AS T2 ON T1.account_id = T2.account_id WHERE STRFTIME('%Y', T1.date) = '1998' AND T1.operation = 'VYBER KARTOU' AND T1.amount < (SELECT AVG(amount) FROM trans WHERE STRFTIME('%Y', date) = '1998')

results.question: How many connections does the atom 19 have?
results.sql: SELECT COUNT(T.bond_id) FROM connected AS T WHERE SUBSTR(T.atom_id, -2) = '19'

results.question: What is the percentage of the cost for the meeting events?
results.sql: SELECT SUM(CASE WHEN T1.type = 'Meeting' THEN T3.cost ELSE 0 END) * 100 / SUM(T3.cost) FROM event AS T1 INNER JOIN budget AS T2 ON T1.event_id = T2.link_to_event INNER JOIN expense AS T3 ON T2.budget_id = T3.link_to_budget

results.question: Find clinics that match specific healthcare needs and services, filter to show only those accepting new patients, and aggregate to find the top 5 most common descriptions of these clinics.

additional_collections.role: holds region names to filter for South Bohemia
identifies account holders who own credit cards
holds region names to filter for South Bohemia
identifies account holders who own credit cards

results.sql: SELECT COUNT(T3.account_id) FROM district AS T1 INNER JOIN client AS T2 ON T1.district_id = T2.district_id INNER JOIN disp AS T3 ON T2.client_id = T3.client_id WHERE T1.A3 = 'south Bohemia' AND T3.type != 'OWNER'

results.question: List travel destinations matching a description of 'tropical beaches', count the different destination names, and group results by whether they are popular to see which group has more destinations.

results.question: List all the clients' IDs whose junior credit cards were issued after 1996.
results.sql: SELECT T2.client_id FROM card AS T1 INNER JOIN disp AS T2 ON T1.disp_id = T2.disp_id WHERE T1.type = 'junior' AND T1.issued >= '1997-01-01'

results.question: What are the short name of team who played safe while creating chance of passing?
results.sql: SELECT DISTINCT t1.team_short_name FROM Team AS t1 INNER JOIN Team_Attributes AS t2 ON t1.team_api_id = t2.team_api_id WHERE t2.chanceCreationPassingClass = 'Safe'

results.question: Identify by their ID the molecules in which there is carbon.
results.sql: SELECT T.molecule_id FROM atom AS T WHERE T.element = 'c'

What are Alexis Blin's sprint speed, agility, and acceleration scores?
results.sql: SELECT sprint_speed, agility, acceleration FROM Player_Attributes WHERE player_api_id IN ( SELECT player_api_id FROM Player WHERE player_name = 'Alexis Blin' )

results.question: Find destinations with a description similar to 'scenic views', filter those with 'island' in their destinationName, group results by destinationName, and calculate the percentage of popular destinations within each group.

results.sql: SELECT COUNT(Id) FROM votes WHERE UserId = 58 AND CreationDate = '2010-07-19'

results.question: What is the highest overall rating received by Dorlan Pabon?

results.question: How many users obtained the "Announcer" badge?
results.sql: SELECT COUNT(id) FROM badges WHERE Name = 'Announcer'

results.question: Please list the phone numbers of the direct charter-funded schools that are opened after 2000/1/1.

results.question: What is the difference between the number of molecules that are carcinogenic and those that are not?
results.sql: SELECT COUNT(CASE WHEN T.label = '+' THEN T.molecule_id ELSE NULL END) - COUNT(CASE WHEN T.label = '-' THEN T.molecule_id ELSE NULL END) AS diff_car_notcar FROM molecule t

results.question: How old is the youngest Japanese driver? What is his name?
results.sql: SELECT STRFTIME('%Y', CURRENT_TIMESTAMP) - STRFTIME('%Y', dob), forename , surname FROM drivers WHERE nationality = 'Japanese' ORDER BY dob DESC LIMIT 1

results.question: For the patient who got the laboratory test of uric acid level as 8.4 on 1991-10-21, how old was he/she at that time?

links accounts to districts via district_id

results.sql: SELECT T3.type FROM district AS T1 INNER JOIN account AS T2 ON T1.district_id = T2.district_id INNER JOIN disp AS T3 ON T2.account_id = T3.account_id WHERE T3.type != 'OWNER' AND T1.A11 BETWEEN 8000 AND 9000

results.question: Identify clinics that offer dental services by performing a search for relevant specialties, filter specifically for a clinic named Sunny Clinic, determine the maximum average patient satisfaction score, and group the results based on whether they are accepting new patients or not.

results.question: Give the location for "Spring Budget Review".

results.question: Describe the names of neutral alignment superheroes.

results.question: How many molecules have a double bond type and among these molecule, how many are labeled as carcinogenic compound?

results.question: When is the birthday of the football player who has the highest overall rating?

results.question: Which post by Harvey Motulsky has the most views? Please give the id and title of this post.
results.sql: SELECT T2.Id, T2.Title FROM users AS T1 INNER JOIN posts AS T2 ON T1.Id = T2.OwnerUserId WHERE T1.DisplayName = 'Harvey Motulsky' ORDER BY T2.ViewCount DESC LIMIT 1

results.question: Please list the full names of the students in the Student_Club that come from the Art and Design Department.

results.question: Among the patients with the normal level of triglyceride, how many of them have other symptoms observed?
results.sql: SELECT COUNT(T1.ID) FROM Examination AS T1 INNER JOIN Laboratory AS T2 ON T1.ID = T2.ID WHERE T2.TG < 200 AND T1.Symptoms IS NOT NULL

results.question: In the molecule containing sodium atoms, how many are non-carcinogenic?

holds label information for filtering non-carcinogenic molecules

results.sql: SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT T2.molecule_id) FROM atom AS T1 INNER JOIN molecule AS T2 ON T1.molecule_id = T2.molecule_id WHERE T1.element = 'na' AND T2.label = '-'

results.question: Which patient has a normal proteinuria level and is diagnosed with SLE? Please give his or her patient ID.
results.sql: SELECT DISTINCT T1.ID FROM Patient AS T1 INNER JOIN Laboratory AS T2 ON T1.ID = T2.ID WHERE T2.`U-PRO` > 0 AND T2.`U-PRO` < 30 AND T1.Diagnosis = 'SLE'

results.question: What is the ratio of male to female patients among all those with abnormal uric acid counts?
results.sql: SELECT CAST(SUM(CASE WHEN T2.UA <= 8.0 AND T1.SEX = 'M' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS REAL) / SUM(CASE WHEN T2.UA <= 6.5 AND T1.SEX = 'F' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) FROM Patient AS T1 INNER JOIN Laboratory AS T2 ON T1.ID = T2.ID

results.question: Find popular travel destinations with descriptions that include scenic vistas and vibrant cultures, and group these destinations by their destinationName.
What is the title of the post that is owned by csgillespie and has the highest popularity?
results.sql: SELECT T1.Title FROM posts AS T1 INNER JOIN users AS T2 ON T1.OwnerUserId = T2.Id WHERE T2.DisplayName = 'csgillespie' ORDER BY T1.ViewCount DESC LIMIT 1

results.question: What are the romantic Italian restaurants that are currently open now, and what is the most common description among them, grouped by their name?

holds average salary (A11) to identify highest salary branch
holds account opening dates and links to clients
holds average salary (A11) to identify highest salary branch

results.sql: SELECT T2.gender FROM district AS T1 INNER JOIN client AS T2 ON T1.district_id = T2.district_id ORDER BY T1.A11 DESC, T2.birth_date ASC LIMIT 1

results.question: State the race and year of race in which Michael Schumacher had his fastest lap.

additional_collections.role: holds lap times and driverId for filtering
holds lap times and driverId for filtering

results.sql: SELECT T1.name, T1.year FROM races AS T1 INNER JOIN lapTimes AS T2 ON T2.raceId = T1.raceId INNER JOIN drivers AS T3 ON T3.driverId = T2.driverId WHERE T3.forename = 'Michael' AND T3.surname = 'Schumacher' ORDER BY T2.milliseconds ASC LIMIT 1

results.question: Based on posts posted by Community, calculate the percentage of posts that use the R language.
results.sql: SELECT CAST(SUM(IIF(T3.TagName = 'r', 1, 0)) AS REAL) * 100 / COUNT(T1.Id) FROM users AS T1 INNER JOIN postHistory AS T2 ON T1.Id = T2.UserId INNER JOIN tags AS T3 ON T3.ExcerptPostId = T2.PostId WHERE T1.DisplayName = 'Community'

results.question: What is the count of unique museum names in the Museums collection?
Name the driver with the most winning. Mention his nationality and what is his maximum point scores.

additional_collections.role: provides driver nationality and full name
provides driver nationality and full name

results.sql: SELECT T1.forename, T1.surname, T1.nationality, MAX(T2.points) FROM drivers AS T1 INNER JOIN driverStandings AS T2 ON T2.driverId = T1.driverId WHERE T2.wins >= 1 GROUP BY T1.forename, T1.surname, T1.nationality ORDER BY COUNT(T2.wins) DESC LIMIT 1

results.question: Calculate the percentage whereby Hamilton was not at the 1st track of the the f1 circuit since 2010.
results.sql: SELECT CAST(COUNT(CASE WHEN T2.position <> 1 THEN T2.position END) AS REAL) * 100 / COUNT(T2.driverStandingsId) FROM races AS T1 INNER JOIN driverStandings AS T2 ON T2.raceId = T1.raceId INNER JOIN drivers AS T3 ON T3.driverId = T2.driverId WHERE T3.surname = 'Hamilton' AND T1.year >= 2010

results.question: Name the account numbers of female clients who are oldest and have lowest average salary?
results.sql: SELECT T3.account_id FROM client AS T1 INNER JOIN district AS T2 ON T1.district_id = T2.district_id INNER JOIN account AS T3 ON T2.district_id = T3.district_id INNER JOIN disp AS T4 ON T1.client_id = T4.client_id AND T4.account_id = T3.account_id  WHERE T1.gender = 'F' ORDER BY T1.birth_date ASC, T2.A11 ASC LIMIT 1

results.question: Provide superheroes' names who have the adaptation power.
results.sql: SELECT T1.superhero_name FROM superhero AS T1 INNER JOIN hero_power AS T2 ON T1.id = T2.hero_id INNER JOIN superpower AS T3 ON T2.power_id = T3.id WHERE T3.power_name = 'Adaptation'

results.question: State all the tags used by Mark Meckes in his posts that doesn't have comments.
results.sql: SELECT T3.Tags FROM users AS T1 INNER JOIN postHistory AS T2 ON T1.Id = T2.UserId INNER JOIN posts AS T3 ON T3.Id = T2.PostId WHERE T1.DisplayName = 'Mark Meckes' AND T3.CommentCount = 0

results.question: How many green-skinned villains are there in the superhero universe?
results.sql: SELECT COUNT(T1.id) FROM superhero AS T1 INNER JOIN alignment AS T2 ON T1.alignment_id = T2.id INNER JOIN colour AS T3 ON T1.skin_colour_id = T3.id WHERE T2.alignment = 'Bad' AND T3.colour = 'Green'

results.question: What is the average overall rating of the football player Aaron Doran?
results.sql: SELECT CAST(SUM(t2.overall_rating) AS REAL) / COUNT(t2.id) FROM Player AS t1 INNER JOIN Player_Attributes AS t2 ON t1.player_api_id = t2.player_api_id WHERE t1.player_name = 'Aaron Doran'

results.question: What is the language of the card that has azorius watermark? List out the type of this card.
results.sql: SELECT DISTINCT T2.language, T1.type FROM cards AS T1 INNER JOIN foreign_data AS T2 ON T2.uuid = T1.uuid WHERE T1.watermark = 'azorius'

results.question: How many users from New York have a teacher and supporter badge?
results.sql: SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT T1.Id) FROM badges AS T1 INNER JOIN users AS T2 ON T1.UserId = T2.Id WHERE T1.Name IN ('Supporter', 'Teacher') AND T2.Location = 'New York'

results.question: List the football teams that has a chance creation passing class of Risky. Inidcate its short name only.
results.sql: SELECT DISTINCT t1.team_short_name FROM Team AS t1 INNER JOIN Team_attributes AS t2 ON t1.team_api_id = t2.team_api_id WHERE t2.chanceCreationPassingClass = 'Risky'

results.question: How many elements are there for single bond molecules?
results.sql: SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT T.element) FROM ( SELECT DISTINCT T2.molecule_id, T1.element FROM atom AS T1 INNER JOIN molecule AS T2 ON T1.molecule_id = T2.molecule_id INNER JOIN bond AS T3 ON T2.molecule_id = T3.molecule_id WHERE T3.bond_type = '-' ) AS T

results.question: Did Maya Mclean attend the 'Women's Soccer' event?

additional_collections.role: holds first_name and last_name for filtering
holds first_name and last_name for filtering

results.sql: SELECT CASE WHEN T3.event_name = 'Women''s Soccer' THEN 'YES' END AS result FROM member AS T1 INNER JOIN attendance AS T2 ON T1.member_id = T2.link_to_member INNER JOIN event AS T3 ON T2.link_to_event = T3.event_id WHERE T1.first_name = 'Maya' AND T1.last_name = 'Mclean'

results.question: Among all the lap records set on various circuits, what is the time for the fastest one?
results.sql: SELECT time FROM lapTimes ORDER BY (CASE WHEN INSTR(time, ':') <> INSTR(SUBSTR(time, INSTR(time, ':') + 1), ':') + INSTR(time, ':') THEN CAST(SUBSTR(time, 1, INSTR(time, ':') - 1) AS REAL) * 3600 ELSE 0 END) + (CAST(SUBSTR(time, INSTR(time, ':') - 2 * (INSTR(time, ':') = INSTR(SUBSTR(time, INSTR(time, ':') + 1), ':') + INSTR(time, ':')), INSTR(time, ':') - 1) AS REAL) * 60) + (CAST(SUBSTR(time, INSTR(time, ':') + 1, INSTR(time, '.') - INSTR(time, ':') - 1) AS REAL)) + (CAST(SUBSTR(time, INSTR(time, '.') + 1) AS REAL) / 1000) ASC LIMIT 1

results.question: Who are the top 5 players who perform better in crossing actions? Indicate their player id.
results.sql: SELECT id FROM Player_Attributes ORDER BY crossing DESC LIMIT 5

results.question: Which publisher published the slowest superhero?

results.question: Consider the average difference between K-12 enrollment and 15-17 enrollment of schools that are locally funded, list the names and DOC type of schools which has a difference above this average.
results.sql: SELECT T2.School, T2.DOC FROM frpm AS T1 INNER JOIN schools AS T2 ON T1.CDSCode = T2.CDSCode WHERE T2.FundingType = 'Locally funded' AND (T1.`Enrollment (K-12)` - T1.`Enrollment (Ages 5-17)`) > (SELECT AVG(T3.`Enrollment (K-12)` - T3.`Enrollment (Ages 5-17)`) FROM frpm AS T3 INNER JOIN schools AS T4 ON T3.CDSCode = T4.CDSCode WHERE T4.FundingType = 'Locally funded')

results.question: Identify the display name and location of the user, who was the last to edit the post with ID 183.

results.question: What is the eligible free or reduced price meal rate for the top 5 schools in grades 1-12 with the highest free or reduced price meal count of the schools with the ownership code 66?

results.question: What was the growth rate of the total amount of loans across all accounts for a male client between 1996 and 1997?

links loans to clients via account_id
holds gender information to filter for male clients
links loans to clients via account_id

results.sql: SELECT CAST((SUM(CASE WHEN STRFTIME('%Y', T1.date) = '1997' THEN T1.amount ELSE 0 END) - SUM(CASE WHEN STRFTIME('%Y', T1.date) = '1996' THEN T1.amount ELSE 0 END)) AS REAL) * 100 / SUM(CASE WHEN STRFTIME('%Y', T1.date) = '1996' THEN T1.amount ELSE 0 END) FROM loan AS T1 INNER JOIN account AS T2 ON T1.account_id = T2.account_id INNER JOIN disp AS T3 ON T3.account_id = T2.account_id INNER JOIN client AS T4 ON T4.client_id = T3.client_id WHERE T4.gender = 'M' AND T3.type = 'OWNER'

results.question: What is the percentage of carbon in double-bond molecules?

results.question: Please list the lap records for the circuits in Italy.
results.sql: WITH fastest_lap_times AS (SELECT T1.raceId, T1.FastestLapTime, (CAST(SUBSTR(T1.FastestLapTime, 1, INSTR(T1.FastestLapTime, ':') - 1) AS REAL) * 60) + (CAST(SUBSTR(T1.FastestLapTime, INSTR(T1.FastestLapTime, ':') + 1, INSTR(T1.FastestLapTime, '.') - INSTR(T1.FastestLapTime, ':') - 1) AS REAL)) + (CAST(SUBSTR(T1.FastestLapTime, INSTR(T1.FastestLapTime, '.') + 1) AS REAL) / 1000) as time_in_seconds FROM results AS T1 WHERE T1.FastestLapTime IS NOT NULL ) SELECT T1.FastestLapTime as lap_record FROM results AS T1 INNER JOIN races AS T2 on T1.raceId = T2.raceId INNER JOIN circuits AS T3 on T2.circuitId = T3.circuitId INNER JOIN (SELECT MIN(fastest_lap_times.time_in_seconds) as min_time_in_seconds FROM fastest_lap_times INNER JOIN races AS T2 on fastest_lap_times.raceId = T2.raceId INNER JOIN circuits AS T3 on T2.circuitId = T3.circuitId WHERE T3.country = 'Italy' ) AS T4 ON (CAST(SUBSTR(T1.FastestLapTime, 1, INSTR(T1.FastestLapTime, ':') - 1) AS REAL) * 60) + (CAST(SUBSTR(T1.FastestLapTime, INSTR(T1.FastestLapTime, ':') + 1, INSTR(T1.FastestLapTime, '.') - INSTR(T1.FastestLapTime, ':') - 1) AS REAL)) + (CAST(SUBSTR(T1.FastestLapTime, INSTR(T1.FastestLapTime, '.') + 1) AS REAL) / 1000) = T4.min_time_in_seconds LIMIT 1

results.question: Find museums where the exhibit highlights emphasize historical significance, filter for museums with entry fees exceeding 10, and group the results by each museum's name.
How much faster in percentage is the champion than the driver who finished the race last in the 2008 Australian Grand Prix?

additional_collections.role: filters by race name and year
filters by race name and year

results.sql: WITH time_in_seconds AS ( SELECT T1.positionOrder, CASE WHEN T1.positionOrder = 1 THEN (CAST(SUBSTR(T1.time, 1, 1) AS REAL) * 3600) + (CAST(SUBSTR(T1.time, 3, 2) AS REAL) * 60) + CAST(SUBSTR(T1.time, 6) AS REAL) ELSE CAST(SUBSTR(T1.time, 2) AS REAL) END AS time_seconds FROM results AS T1 INNER JOIN races AS T2 ON T1.raceId = T2.raceId WHERE T2.name = 'Australian Grand Prix' AND T1.time IS NOT NULL AND T2.year = 2008 ), champion_time AS ( SELECT time_seconds FROM time_in_seconds WHERE positionOrder = 1), last_driver_incremental AS ( SELECT time_seconds FROM time_in_seconds WHERE positionOrder = (SELECT MAX(positionOrder) FROM time_in_seconds) ) SELECT (CAST((SELECT time_seconds FROM last_driver_incremental) AS REAL) * 100) / (SELECT time_seconds + (SELECT time_seconds FROM last_driver_incremental) FROM champion_time)

results.question: Which card costs more converted mana, "Serra Angel" or "Shrine Keeper"?
results.sql: SELECT name FROM cards WHERE name IN ('Serra Angel', 'Shrine Keeper') ORDER BY convertedManaCost DESC LIMIT 1

results.question: Among the superheroes with height from 170 to 190, list the names of the superheroes with no eye color.
results.sql: SELECT DISTINCT T1.superhero_name FROM superhero AS T1 INNER JOIN colour AS T2 ON T1.eye_colour_id = T2.id WHERE T1.height_cm BETWEEN 170 AND 190 AND T2.colour = 'No Colour'

results.question: How many users are awarded with supporter badge during year 2011?
results.sql: SELECT COUNT(Id) FROM badges WHERE STRFTIME('%Y', Date) = '2011' AND Name = 'Supporter'

results.question: Describe the information about rulings for card named 'Sublime Epiphany' with number 74s.
results.sql: SELECT T2.text FROM cards AS T1 INNER JOIN rulings AS T2 ON T1.uuid = T2.uuid WHERE T1.name = 'Sublime Epiphany' AND T1.number = '74s'

results.question: What elements are in a double type bond?
results.sql: SELECT DISTINCT T1.element FROM atom AS T1 INNER JOIN bond AS T2 ON T1.molecule_id = T2.molecule_id INNER JOIN connected AS T3 ON T1.atom_id = T3.atom_id WHERE T2.bond_type = '='

results.question: What is the lowest grade for the District Special Education Consortia School with National Center for Educational Statistics school district identification number of 0613360?
results.sql: SELECT MIN(T1.`Low Grade`) FROM frpm AS T1 INNER JOIN schools AS T2 ON T1.CDSCode = T2.CDSCode WHERE T2.NCESDist = '0613360' AND T2.EdOpsCode = 'SPECON'

results.question: Please provide the diagnosis of patients with ALT glutamic pylvic transaminase beyond the normal range by ascending order of their date of birth.

additional_collections.role: provides diagnosis and birthday for output and ordering
provides diagnosis and birthday for output and ordering

results.sql: SELECT DISTINCT T1.Diagnosis FROM Patient AS T1 INNER JOIN Laboratory AS T2 ON T1.ID = T2.ID WHERE T2.GPT > 60 ORDER BY T1.Birthday ASC

results.question: How many races in the year 2010 are held on grand prixs outside Asia and Europe?
results.sql: SELECT COUNT(T3.raceId) FROM circuits AS T1 INNER JOIN races AS T3 ON T3.circuitID = T1.circuitId WHERE T1.country NOT IN ( 'Bahrain', 'China', 'Singapore', 'Japan', 'Korea', 'Turkey', 'UAE', 'Malaysia', 'Spain', 'Monaco', 'Azerbaijan', 'Austria', 'Belgium', 'France', 'Germany', 'Hungary', 'Italy', 'UK' ) AND T3.year = 2010

results.question: For the user with the display name of "Tiago Pasqualini", how many posts did he/she own?
results.sql: SELECT COUNT(T1.Id) FROM users AS T1 INNER JOIN posts AS T2 ON T1.Id = T2.OwnerUserId WHERE T1.DisplayName = 'Tiago Pasqualini'

results.question: What is the average of fastest lap speed in the 2009 Spanish Grand Prix race?

additional_collections.role: holds race name and year for filtering
holds race name and year for filtering

results.sql: SELECT AVG(T1.fastestLapSpeed) FROM results AS T1 INNER JOIN races AS T2 on T1.raceId = T2.raceId WHERE T2.year = 2009 AND T2.name = 'Spanish Grand Prix'

results.question: Find museums with exhibits highlighting the historical significance of Vincent van Gogh's pieces using semantic search, filter for museums whose names include 'National', aggregate by counting the number of museums open today, and group results by museumName.

query_args.search_query: historical significance of Vincent van Gogh's pieces

results.question: List down the uuid for legacy cards and the foreign language of these cards.
results.sql: SELECT T1.uuid, T3.language FROM cards AS T1 INNER JOIN legalities AS T2 ON T1.uuid = T2.uuid INNER JOIN foreign_data AS T3 ON T1.uuid = T3.uuid WHERE T2.format = 'legacy'

results.question: Among the molecules between TR004 to TR010, how many of them has single bonds?
results.sql: SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT T.molecule_id) FROM bond AS T WHERE T.molecule_id BETWEEN 'TR004' AND 'TR010' AND T.bond_type = '-'

results.question: How many unknown power cards contain info about the triggered ability

output_properties.property_name: unique id number identifying the cards

results.sql: SELECT T2.text FROM cards AS T1 INNER JOIN rulings AS T2 ON T1.uuid = T2.uuid WHERE (T1.power IS NULL OR T1.power = '*') AND T2.text LIKE '%triggered ability%'

results.question: Group all travel destinations by the boolean property popular and determine the averageVisitCost for each group to understand the cost difference between popular and non-popular destinations.
What are the accounts that have gold credit cards?
results.sql: SELECT T2.account_id FROM disp AS T2  INNER JOIN card AS T1 ON T1.disp_id = T2.disp_id  WHERE T1.type = 'gold'

results.question: List down Ajax's superpowers.
results.sql: SELECT T3.power_name FROM superhero AS T1 INNER JOIN hero_power AS T2 ON T1.id = T2.hero_id INNER JOIN superpower AS T3 ON T2.power_id = T3.id WHERE T1.superhero_name = 'Ajax'

results.question: Among the posts that were voted by user 1465, what is the id of the most valuable post?
results.sql: SELECT T2.Id FROM votes AS T1 INNER JOIN posts AS T2 ON T1.PostId = T2.Id WHERE T1.UserId = 1465 ORDER BY T2.FavoriteCount DESC LIMIT 1

results.question: Of the patients with an normal level of IGG, how many of them admitted to the hospital?
results.sql: SELECT COUNT(T1.ID) FROM Patient AS T1 INNER JOIN Laboratory AS T2 ON T1.ID = T2.ID WHERE T2.IGG > 900 AND T2.IGG <2000 AND  T1.Admission = '+'

results.question: What are the top 5 most common areas of expertise for doctors, grouped by whether they are currently practicing?
Among the players with an overall rating between 60 to 65, how many players whose going to be in all of your attack moves instead of defensing?
results.sql: SELECT COUNT(id) FROM Player_Attributes WHERE overall_rating BETWEEN 60 AND 65 AND defensive_work_rate = 'low'

results.question: List the names of closed event as "game" that was closed from 3/15/2019 to 3/20/2020.
results.sql: SELECT DISTINCT event_name FROM event WHERE type = 'Game' AND date(SUBSTR(event_date, 1, 10)) BETWEEN '2019-03-15' AND '2020-03-20' AND status = 'Closed'

results.question: Which drivers born after 1975 have been ranked 2? Please give their forenames and surnames.
results.sql: SELECT T2.forename, T2.surname FROM results AS T1 INNER JOIN drivers AS T2 on T1.driverId = T2.driverId WHERE STRFTIME('%Y', T2.dob) > '1975' AND T1.rank = 2

results.question: Find museums that have Impressionist art mentioned in their exhibitHighlights, calculate the average entryFee, and group results based on whether they are openToday.
Among the badges obtained by csgillespie, how many of them were obtained in the year 2011?
results.sql: SELECT COUNT(T1.Id) FROM badges AS T1 INNER JOIN users AS T2 ON T1.UserId = T2.Id WHERE STRFTIME('%Y', T1.Date) = '2011' AND T2.DisplayName = 'csgillespie'

results.question: Provide the related post title of "How to tell if something happened in a data set which monitors a value over time".
results.sql: SELECT T3.Title FROM postLinks AS T1 INNER JOIN posts AS T2 ON T1.PostId = T2.Id INNER JOIN posts AS T3 ON T1.RelatedPostId = T3.Id WHERE T2.Title = 'How to tell if something happened in a data set which monitors a value over time'

results.question: What kind of expenses incurred by members who have X-Large in size of tee shirt?
results.sql: SELECT T2.expense_description FROM member AS T1 INNER JOIN expense AS T2 ON T1.member_id = T2.link_to_member WHERE T1.t_shirt_size = 'X-Large'

results.question: Please list top three unknown power cards that have promotional types for arena league in alphabetical order.
results.sql: SELECT name FROM cards WHERE (power IS NULL OR power LIKE '%*%') AND promoTypes = 'arenaleague' ORDER BY name LIMIT 3

results.question: Among the students from the Student_Club who attended the event "Women's Soccer", how many of them want a T-shirt that's in medium size?
results.sql: SELECT COUNT(T1.event_id) FROM event AS T1 INNER JOIN attendance AS T2 ON T1.event_id = T2.link_to_event INNER JOIN member AS T3 ON T2.link_to_member = T3.member_id WHERE T1.event_name = 'Women''s Soccer' AND T3.t_shirt_size = 'Medium'

results.question: Please list all the superpowers of 3-D Man.
results.sql: SELECT T3.power_name FROM superhero AS T1 INNER JOIN hero_power AS T2 ON T1.id = T2.hero_id INNER JOIN superpower AS T3 ON T2.power_id = T3.id WHERE T1.superhero_name = '3-D Man'

results.question: What is the composition of element chlorine in percentage among the single bond molecules?
results.sql: SELECT CAST(COUNT(CASE WHEN T.element = 'cl' THEN T.atom_id ELSE NULL END) AS REAL) * 100 / COUNT(T.atom_id) FROM ( SELECT T1.atom_id, T1.element FROM atom AS T1 INNER JOIN molecule AS T2 ON T1.molecule_id = T2.molecule_id INNER JOIN bond AS T3 ON T2.molecule_id = T3.molecule_id WHERE T3.bond_type = '-' ) AS T

results.question: Which districts have transactions greater than USS$10,000 in 1997?
results.sql: SELECT T1.district_id FROM account AS T1 INNER JOIN district AS T2 ON T1.district_id = T2.district_id INNER JOIN trans AS T3 ON T1.account_id = T3.account_id WHERE STRFTIME('%Y', T3.date) = '1997' GROUP BY T1.district_id HAVING SUM(T3.amount) > 10000

results.question: Identify exhibitions focusing on historical themes, group them by their current status of being open to the public, and compute the percentage of exhibitions that are currently running.
Calculate the percentage of members who are major Business in the list?
results.sql: SELECT CAST(SUM(CASE WHEN T2.major_name = 'Business' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS REAL) * 100 / COUNT(T1.member_id) FROM member AS T1 INNER JOIN major AS T2 ON T2.major_id = T1.link_to_major WHERE T1.position = 'Member'

results.question: How many of the molecules are carcinogenic?
results.sql: SELECT COUNT(T.molecule_id) FROM molecule AS T WHERE T.label = '+'

results.question: What is the average score of Stephen Turner's posts?
results.sql: SELECT AVG(T2.Score) FROM users AS T1 INNER JOIN posts AS T2 ON T1.Id = T2.OwnerUserId WHERE T1.DisplayName = 'Stephen Turner'

results.question: For the patient with the highest lactate dehydrogenase in the normal range, when was his or her data first recorded?
results.sql: SELECT T1.`First Date` FROM Patient AS T1 INNER JOIN Laboratory AS T2 ON T1.ID = T2.ID WHERE T2.LDH < 500 ORDER BY T2.LDH ASC LIMIT 1

results.question: Find exhibitions that are about modern art with innovative displays by looking at the exhibition descriptions. Filter these exhibitions to include only those with 'Masterpiece' in their titles. Then, group the results based on whether the exhibitions are currently running or not.

results.sql: SELECT T3.forename, T3.surname, T2.points FROM races AS T1 INNER JOIN driverStandings AS T2 ON T2.raceId = T1.raceId INNER JOIN drivers AS T3 ON T3.driverId = T2.driverId ORDER BY T2.points DESC LIMIT 1

results.question: Identify travel packages providing a relaxing beach holiday (using search_query on packageDetails). Within these, calculate the average packagePrice (using int_property_aggregation on packagePrice), and group the results by whether there is a discountAvailable (using groupby on discountAvailable).
For the patients who are diagnosed with SJS, how many of them have a normal level of total protein?
results.sql: SELECT COUNT(T1.ID) FROM Patient AS T1 INNER JOIN Laboratory AS T2 ON T1.ID = T2.ID WHERE T1.Diagnosis = 'SJS' AND T2.TP > 6.0 AND T2.TP < 8.5

results.question: Identify the type of expenses and their total value approved for 'October Meeting' event.
results.sql: SELECT T1.type, SUM(T3.cost) FROM event AS T1 INNER JOIN budget AS T2 ON T1.event_id = T2.link_to_event INNER JOIN expense AS T3 ON T2.budget_id = T3.link_to_budget WHERE T1.event_name = 'October Meeting'

results.question: For the first client who opened his/her account in Prague, what is his/her account ID?

holds region names to filter for Prague

results.sql: SELECT T1.account_id FROM account AS T1 INNER JOIN district AS T2 ON T1.district_id = T2.district_id WHERE T2.A3 = 'Prague' ORDER BY T1.date ASC LIMIT 1

results.question: Find restaurants offering Italian cuisine with a cozy atmosphere, with at least an average rating of 4.5. Also, calculate the percentage of these restaurants that are open and group results based on their open status.

query_args.search_query: Italian cuisine with a cozy atmosphere

results.question: Identify courses related to machine learning that have a courseDuration of at least 5 hours, and determine the most frequently occurring courseTitle.

additional_collections.role: provides age information for filtering teenagers
provides age information for filtering teenagers

results.sql: SELECT CAST(SUM(IIF(T2.Age BETWEEN 13 AND 18, 1, 0)) AS REAL) * 100 / COUNT(T1.Id) FROM badges AS T1 INNER JOIN users AS T2 ON T1.UserId = T2.Id WHERE T1.`Name` = 'Organizer'

results.question: Does bond id TR001_1_8 have both element of chlorine and carbon?
results.sql: SELECT T2.bond_id, T2.atom_id2, T1.element AS flag_have_CaCl FROM atom AS T1 INNER JOIN connected AS T2 ON T2.atom_id = T1.atom_id WHERE T2.bond_id = 'TR001_1_8' AND (T1.element = 'c1' OR T1.element = 'c')

results.question: What's Lewis Hamilton's reference name?
results.sql: SELECT driverRef FROM drivers WHERE forename = 'Lewis' AND surname = 'Hamilton'

results.question: There's one customer spent 214582.17 in the June of 2013, which currency did he/she use?
results.sql: SELECT T2.Currency FROM yearmonth AS T1 INNER JOIN customers AS T2 ON T1.CustomerID = T2.CustomerID WHERE T1.Date = '201306' AND T1.Consumption = 214582.17

results.question: Write the full name of the club member with the position of 'Secretary' and list which college the club member belongs to.
results.sql: SELECT T1.first_name, T1.last_name, college FROM member AS T1 INNER JOIN major AS T2 ON T2.major_id = T1.link_to_major WHERE T1.position = 'Secretary'

results.question: Among the schools with the SAT test takers of over 500, please list the schools that are magnet schools or offer a magnet program.
results.sql: SELECT T2.School FROM satscores AS T1 INNER JOIN schools AS T2 ON T1.cds = T2.CDSCode WHERE T2.Magnet = 1 AND T1.NumTstTakr > 500

results.question: Find restaurants where openNow is true.
How many of the accounts are from Jesenik district?
results.sql: SELECT COUNT(T2.account_id) FROM district AS T1 INNER JOIN account AS T2 ON T1.district_id = T2.district_id WHERE T1.A2 = 'Jesenik'

results.question: What is the overall rating of the football player Gabriel Tamas in year 2011?
results.sql: SELECT t2.overall_rating FROM Player AS t1 INNER JOIN Player_Attributes AS t2 ON t1.player_api_id = t2.player_api_id WHERE t1.player_name = 'Gabriel Tamas' AND strftime('%Y', t2.date) = '2011'

results.question: Among the players with finishing rate of 1, pick the eldest player and state the player's name.
results.sql: SELECT DISTINCT t1.player_name FROM Player AS t1 INNER JOIN Player_Attributes AS t2 ON t1.player_api_id = t2.player_api_id WHERE t2.finishing = 1 ORDER BY t1.birthday ASC LIMIT 1

results.question: What was the position of the circuits during Lewis Hamilton's fastest lap in a Formula_1 race?
results.sql: SELECT T1.position FROM lapTimes AS T1 INNER JOIN drivers AS T2 on T1.driverId = T2.driverId WHERE T2.forename = 'Lewis' AND T2.surname = 'Hamilton' ORDER BY T1.time ASC LIMIT 1

results.question: When was the medical information on patient number 48473 first documented, and what disease did she have?
results.sql: SELECT `First Date`, Diagnosis FROM Patient WHERE ID = 48473

results.question: How many Japanese constructors have 0 points in 2 races?
results.sql: SELECT COUNT(T1.raceId) FROM constructorStandings AS T1 INNER JOIN constructors AS T2 on T1.constructorId = T2.constructorId WHERE T1.points = 0 AND T2.nationality = 'Japanese' GROUP BY T1.constructorId HAVING COUNT(raceId) = 2

results.question: How many patients with a abnormal C-reactive protein don't have their data recorded?
results.sql: SELECT COUNT(T1.ID) FROM Patient AS T1 INNER JOIN Laboratory AS T2 ON T1.ID = T2.ID WHERE (T2.CRP = '+' ) AND T1.Description IS NULL

results.sql: SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT T1.ID) FROM Patient AS T1 INNER JOIN Examination AS T2 ON T1.ID = T2.ID WHERE T1.Admission = '+' AND STRFTIME('%Y', T2.`Examination Date`) - STRFTIME('%Y', T1.`First Date`) >= 1

results.question: How much did customer 6 consume in total between August and November 2013?
results.sql: SELECT SUM(Consumption) FROM yearmonth WHERE CustomerID = 6 AND Date BETWEEN '201308' AND '201311'

results.question: Write down the atom IDs of the first and second atoms of triple bond type molecules.
results.sql: SELECT T2.atom_id, T2.atom_id2 FROM bond AS T1 INNER JOIN connected AS T2 ON T1.bond_id = T2.bond_id WHERE T1.bond_type = '#'

results.question: Describe the post title which got positive comments and display names of the users who posted those comments.
results.sql: SELECT T1.Title, T2.UserDisplayName FROM posts AS T1 INNER JOIN comments AS T2 ON T2.PostId = T2.Id WHERE T1.Score > 60

results.question: What are the cards belong to duel deck a? List the ID.

results.sql: SELECT id FROM cards WHERE duelDeck = 'a'

results.question: What are the elements of the atoms of TR144_8_19?
results.sql: SELECT T2.element FROM connected AS T1 INNER JOIN atom AS T2 ON T1.atom_id = T2.atom_id WHERE T1.bond_id = 'TR144_8_19'

results.question: What is the total score of the posts edited by Yevgeny and include the user's website URL.

provides website URL and matches DisplayName 'Yevgeny'

results.sql: SELECT SUM(T1.Score), T2.WebsiteUrl FROM posts AS T1 INNER JOIN users AS T2 ON T1.LastEditorUserId = T2.Id WHERE T2.DisplayName = 'Yevgeny' GROUP BY T2.WebsiteUrl

results.question: For all the set of cards that has Brazil Portuguese translation, what is the percentage of them are only available online?
results.sql: SELECT CAST(SUM(CASE WHEN isOnlineOnly = 1 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS REAL) * 100 / COUNT(id) FROM sets WHERE code IN ( SELECT setCode FROM set_translations WHERE language = 'Portuguese (Brazil)' )

results.question: List the players' api id who had the highest above average overall ratings in 2010.

holds overall_rating and date for filtering

results.sql: SELECT player_api_id FROM Player_Attributes WHERE SUBSTR(`date`, 1, 4) = '2010' ORDER BY overall_rating DESC LIMIT 1

results.question: What is the element with the atom ID of TR004_7 in molecule that is not carcinogenic?

holds label to filter non-carcinogenic molecules

results.sql: SELECT T1.element FROM atom AS T1 INNER JOIN molecule AS T2 ON T1.molecule_id = T2.molecule_id WHERE T1.atom_id = 'TR004_7' AND T2.label = '-'

results.sql: SELECT T1.superhero_name FROM superhero AS T1 INNER JOIN hero_power AS T2 ON T1.id = T2.hero_id INNER JOIN superpower AS T3 ON T2.power_id = T3.id WHERE T3.power_name = 'Flight'

results.question: Please state the reference name of the oldest German driver.
results.sql: SELECT driverRef FROM drivers WHERE nationality = 'German' ORDER BY JULIANDAY(dob) ASC LIMIT 1

results.question: Name the superhero, otherwise known as Charles Chandler.
results.sql: SELECT superhero_name FROM superhero WHERE full_name = 'Charles Chandler'

results.question: Among the posts owned by csgillespie, how many of them are root posts?
results.sql: SELECT COUNT(T1.Id) FROM posts AS T1 INNER JOIN users AS T2 ON T1.OwnerUserId = T2.Id WHERE T2.DisplayName = 'csgillespie' AND T1.ParentId IS NULL

results.question: How many white bordered cards are powerful?

output_properties.property_name: unique id number identifying the cards

results.sql: SELECT COUNT(id) FROM cards WHERE borderColor = 'white' AND cardKingdomId IS NOT NULL AND cardKingdomFoilId IS NOT NULL

results.question: For all the transactions happened during 8:00-9:00 in 2012/8/26, how many happened in CZE?
results.sql: SELECT COUNT(T1.TransactionID) FROM transactions_1k AS T1 INNER JOIN gasstations AS T2 ON T1.GasStationID = T2.GasStationID WHERE T1.Date = '2012-08-26' AND T1.Time BETWEEN '08:00:00' AND '09:00:00' AND T2.Country = 'CZE'

results.question: Identify the number of posts and comments left by the user, who has the latest created user account.
results.sql: SELECT COUNT(T2.Id) FROM users AS T1 INNER JOIN posts AS T2 ON T1.Id = T2.OwnerUserId INNER JOIN comments AS T3 ON T3.PostId = T2.Id ORDER BY T1.CreationDate DESC LIMIT 1

results.question: Calculate the percentage of clinics that are accepting new patients, grouped by their average patient satisfaction.

results.sql: SELECT T.bond_type FROM ( SELECT T1.bond_type, COUNT(T1.molecule_id) FROM bond AS T1  WHERE T1.molecule_id = 'TR010' GROUP BY T1.bond_type ORDER BY COUNT(T1.molecule_id) DESC LIMIT 1 ) AS T

results.question: For loans contracts which are still running where client are in debt, list the district of the and the state the percentage unemployment rate increment from year 1995 to 1996.
results.sql: SELECT CAST((T3.A13 - T3.A12) AS REAL) * 100 / T3.A12 FROM loan AS T1 INNER JOIN account AS T2 ON T1.account_id = T2.account_id INNER JOIN district AS T3 ON T2.district_id = T3.district_id WHERE T1.status = 'D'

results.question: What is the highest total bilirubin level recorded? List out the patient details with ID, sex and birthday with that index.

results.question: Find clinics based on a high patient satisfaction, filter to include only those currently accepting new patients, perform an average calculation of the averagePatientSatisfaction, and group the results by clinic name.
For the patients whose anti-SSB are normal, how many of them have other symptoms observed in their examination?
results.sql: SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT T1.ID) FROM Examination AS T1 INNER JOIN Laboratory AS T2 ON T1.ID = T2.ID WHERE T2.SSB = 'negative' OR '0' AND T1.Symptoms IS NOT NULL

results.question: Which are the cards that have incredibly powerful foils.

results.question: How many cards available in paper have a positive starting maximum hand size?

results.sql: SELECT SUM(CASE WHEN availability = 'paper' AND hAND = '3' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) FROM cards

results.question: For each unique exhibitionTitle, determine the count of exhibitions that are currently running by aggregating over the currentlyRunning property and grouping the results by exhibitionTitle.
List down at least five full name of Demi-God superheroes.
results.sql: SELECT T1.full_name FROM superhero AS T1 INNER JOIN race AS T2 ON T1.race_id = T2.id WHERE T2.race = 'Demi-God'

results.question: Who has the highest average finishing rate between the highest and shortest football player?

additional_collections.role: holds height information to identify highest and shortest players
holds height information to identify highest and shortest players

results.sql: SELECT A FROM ( SELECT AVG(finishing) result, 'Max' A FROM Player AS T1 INNER JOIN Player_Attributes AS T2 ON T1.player_api_id = T2.player_api_id WHERE T1.height = ( SELECT MAX(height) FROM Player ) UNION SELECT AVG(finishing) result, 'Min' A FROM Player AS T1 INNER JOIN Player_Attributes AS T2 ON T1.player_api_id = T2.player_api_id WHERE T1.height = ( SELECT MIN(height) FROM Player ) ) ORDER BY result DESC LIMIT 1

holds member information including first_name and last_name

results.question: For the patients who have an abnormal level of anti-DNA, please list the diseases they are diagnosed with.

results.question: How many users received commentator badges in 2014?

results.sql: SELECT CAST(SUM(CASE WHEN borderColor = 'borderless' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS REAL) * 100 / COUNT(id) FROM cards

results.question: How many translations are there for the set of cards with "Angel of Mercy" in it?
results.sql: SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT translation) FROM set_translations WHERE setCode IN ( SELECT setCode FROM cards WHERE name = 'Angel of Mercy' ) AND translation IS NOT NULL

results.question: Which superheroes have blue eyes with brown hair?
results.sql: SELECT T1.superhero_name FROM superhero AS T1 INNER JOIN colour AS T2 ON T1.eye_colour_id = T2.id INNER JOIN colour AS T3 ON T1.hair_colour_id = T3.id WHERE T2.colour = 'Blue' AND T3.colour = 'Brown'

results.question: Find restaurants serving Italian cuisine with a romantic ambiance that are currently open, and calculate the percentage of restaurants that are open.

results.question: Please list a patient's platelet level if it is within the normal range and if he or she is diagnosed with MCTD.
results.sql: SELECT T2.PLT FROM Patient AS T1 INNER JOIN Laboratory AS T2 ON T1.ID = T2.ID WHERE T1.Diagnosis = 'MCTD' AND T2.PLT BETWEEN 100 AND 400

results.question: State what kind of expenses that Sacha Harrison incurred?

holds member names to match Sacha Harrison

results.sql: SELECT T2.expense_description FROM member AS T1 INNER JOIN expense AS T2 ON T1.member_id = T2.link_to_member WHERE T1.first_name = 'Sacha' AND T1.last_name = 'Harrison'

results.question: Find restaurants that match the description 'authentic Italian ambiance', have an averageRating greater than 4, list the top 5 most common restaurant names in this set, and partition the results based on whether the restaurant is currently open or not.
Find doctors in the Doctors collection specializing in 'cardiology' based on their expertise property, and calculate the mean yearsOfExperience for these doctors.
Find all menu items with a price less than $20 and determine the top 3 most common menuItem names.

holds race information for 2009 Spanish Grand Prix

results.sql: SELECT T1.url FROM circuits AS T1 INNER JOIN races AS T2 ON T2.circuitID = T1.circuitId WHERE T2.year = 2009 AND T2.name = 'Spanish Grand Prix'

results.question: How many translations of the name of the set "Tenth Edition"?

results.question: Calculate the difference in the percentage of members in New Jersey and Vermont.
results.sql: SELECT CAST((SUM(CASE WHEN T2.state = 'New Jersey' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) - SUM(CASE WHEN T2.state = 'Vermont' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END)) AS REAL) * 100 / COUNT(T1.member_id) AS diff FROM member AS T1 INNER JOIN zip_code AS T2 ON T2.zip_code = T1.zip

results.question: What are the total party sizes of reservations that mention 'birthday' in notes, grouped by whether the reservation is confirmed?

Find museums where exhibitHighlights contain the keyword 'ancient artifacts', calculate what percentage of these museums are openToday, and group the museums by entryFee to see the distribution across different price categories.
How much did the KAM customers consume in total in May 2013?

additional_collections.role: holds customer segment information for filtering
holds customer segment information for filtering

results.sql: SELECT SUM(T2.Consumption) FROM customers AS T1 INNER JOIN yearmonth AS T2 ON T1.CustomerID = T2.CustomerID WHERE T2.Date = '201305' AND T1.Segment = 'KAM'

results.question: How many badges has the user csgillespie obtained?
results.sql: SELECT COUNT(T1.Id) FROM badges AS T1 INNER JOIN users AS T2 ON T1.UserId = T2.Id WHERE T2.DisplayName = 'csgillespie'

results.question: Search for travel destinations with scenic beaches and vibrant local culture, filter for those that are currently popular, calculate the average cost to visit, and group by destination name.
What is the anti-nucleus antibody concentration of the patient whose total bilirubin is the highest in the normal range?
results.sql: SELECT T3.ANA FROM Patient AS T1 INNER JOIN Laboratory AS T2 ON T1.ID = T2.ID INNER JOIN Examination AS T3 ON T1.ID = T3.ID WHERE T2.`T-BIL` < 2.0 ORDER BY T2.`T-BIL` DESC LIMIT 1

results.question: Identify the heaviest superhero in DC Comics.
results.sql: SELECT T1.superhero_name FROM superhero AS T1 INNER JOIN publisher AS T2 ON T1.publisher_id = T2.id WHERE T2.publisher_name = 'DC Comics' ORDER BY T1.weight_kg DESC LIMIT 1

results.question: Find all travel destinations where the destinationDescription contains the keyword 'beach', and group the results by whether or not the destination is popular.
Please list the year during which the race is held on circuits in Shanghai.
results.sql: SELECT T2.year FROM circuits AS T1 INNER JOIN races AS T2 ON T2.circuitID = T1.circuitId WHERE T1.location = 'Shanghai'

results.question: What is the name of badge that the user whose display name is "Pierre" obtained?
results.sql: SELECT T2.Name FROM users AS T1 INNER JOIN badges AS T2 ON T1.Id = T2.UserId WHERE T1.DisplayName = 'Pierre'

results.question: What are the two most common first names among the school administrators? Indicate the district to which they administer.

provides administrator first names and district information

results.sql: SELECT DISTINCT T1.AdmFName1, T1.District FROM schools AS T1 INNER JOIN ( SELECT admfname1 FROM schools GROUP BY admfname1 ORDER BY COUNT(admfname1) DESC LIMIT 2 ) AS T2 ON T1.AdmFName1 = T2.admfname1

results.question: How many sets are available just in Japanese and not in Magic: The Gathering Online?
results.sql: SELECT COUNT(T1.id) FROM sets AS T1 INNER JOIN set_translations AS T2 ON T2.setCode = T1.code WHERE T2.language = 'Japanese'  AND (T1.mtgoCode IS NULL OR T1.mtgoCode = '')

results.question: What's the fastest lap time ever in a race for Lewis Hamilton?

additional_collections.role: holds driver information to filter by Lewis Hamilton
holds driver information to filter by Lewis Hamilton

results.sql: SELECT T2.fastestLapTime FROM drivers AS T1 INNER JOIN results AS T2 ON T2.driverId = T1.driverId WHERE T1.forename = 'Lewis' AND T1.surname = 'Hamilton' AND T2.fastestLapTime IS NOT NULL ORDER BY T2.fastestLapTime ASC LIMIT 1

results.question: What is Eddie Irvine's average points scored in year 2000?
results.sql: SELECT AVG(T2.points) FROM drivers AS T1 INNER JOIN driverStandings AS T2 ON T2.driverId = T1.driverId INNER JOIN races AS T3 ON T3.raceId = T2.raceId WHERE T1.forename = 'Eddie' AND T1.surname = 'Irvine' AND T3.year = 2000

results.question: What is the unique id of the set that has the highest number of cards?
results.sql: SELECT id FROM sets ORDER BY baseSetSize DESC LIMIT 1

results.question: Please list the name of the districts with accounts that made withdrawal transactions.
results.sql: SELECT DISTINCT T1.A2 FROM district AS T1 INNER JOIN account AS T2 ON T1.district_id = T2.district_id INNER JOIN trans AS T3 ON T2.account_id = T3.account_id WHERE T3.type = 'VYDAJ'

results.question: Identify the atoms belong to the molecule with ID between TR010 to TR050 that contain the element carbon.
results.sql: SELECT T.atom_id FROM atom AS T WHERE T.molecule_id BETWEEN 'TR010' AND 'TR050' AND T.element = 'c'

results.question: How many clinics that offer pediatrics and family healthcare are currently accepting new patients?
Which event has the lowest cost?
results.sql: SELECT T1.event_name FROM event AS T1 INNER JOIN budget AS T2 ON T1.event_id = T2.link_to_event INNER JOIN expense AS T3 ON T2.budget_id = T3.link_to_budget ORDER BY T3.cost LIMIT 1

results.question: What is the total cost of the pizzas for all the events?
results.sql: SELECT SUM(cost) FROM expense WHERE expense_description = 'Pizza'

results.question: How many bonds are created by bonding atoms with chlorine element?
results.sql: SELECT COUNT(T1.bond_id) FROM connected AS T1 INNER JOIN atom AS T2 ON T1.atom_id = T2.atom_id WHERE T2.element = 'cl'

results.question: Show the percentage of popular destinations for each destinationName by grouping the destinations and calculating how many are marked as popular.
For the teams with normal build-up play dribbling class in 2014, List the names of the teams with less than average chance creation passing, in descending order of chance creation passing.
results.sql: SELECT t3.team_long_name FROM Team AS t3 INNER JOIN Team_Attributes AS t4 ON t3.team_api_id = t4.team_api_id WHERE t4.buildUpPlayDribblingClass = 'Normal' AND t4.chanceCreationPassing < ( SELECT CAST(SUM(t2.chanceCreationPassing) AS REAL) / COUNT(t1.id) FROM Team AS t1 INNER JOIN Team_Attributes AS t2 ON t1.team_api_id = t2.team_api_id WHERE t2.buildUpPlayDribblingClass = 'Normal' AND SUBSTR(t2.`date`, 1, 4) = '2014') ORDER BY t4.chanceCreationPassing DESC

results.question: Please list the countries of the gas stations with transactions taken place in June, 2013.

provides country information for gas stations

results.sql: SELECT DISTINCT T2.Country FROM transactions_1k AS T1 INNER JOIN gasstations AS T2 ON T1.GasStationID = T2.GasStationID INNER JOIN yearmonth AS T3 ON T1.CustomerID = T3.CustomerID WHERE T3.Date = '201306'

results.question: What is the name of user with the ID of 30?

results.question: What is the date when the youngest user made his or her first post?

results.question: Which power do superheroes have the most of?
results.sql: SELECT T2.power_name FROM hero_power AS T1 INNER JOIN superpower AS T2 ON T1.power_id = T2.id GROUP BY T2.power_name ORDER BY COUNT(T1.hero_id) DESC LIMIT 1

What is the percentage of the set of cards that have Chinese Simplified as the language and are only available for online games?
results.sql: SELECT CAST(SUM(CASE WHEN T2.language = 'Chinese Simplified' AND T1.isOnlineOnly = 1 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS REAL) * 100 / COUNT(*) FROM sets AS T1 INNER JOIN set_translations AS T2 ON T1.code = T2.setCode

results.question: Give the user's reputation and up vote number of the user that commented "fine, you win :)".
results.sql: SELECT T2.Reputation, T2.UpVotes FROM comments AS T1 INNER JOIN users AS T2 ON T1.UserId = T2.Id WHERE T1.Text = 'fine, you win :)'

results.sql: SELECT DisplayName FROM users WHERE Id = ( SELECT OwnerUserId FROM posts ORDER BY ViewCount DESC LIMIT 1 )

results.question: What is the percentage of loan amount that has been fully paid with no issue.
results.sql: SELECT (CAST(SUM(CASE WHEN status = 'A' THEN amount ELSE 0 END) AS REAL) * 100) / SUM(amount) FROM loan

results.question: List the powers of Hunter Zolomon.
results.sql: SELECT T3.power_name FROM superhero AS T1 INNER JOIN hero_power AS T2 ON T1.id = T2.hero_id INNER JOIN superpower AS T3 ON T2.power_id = T3.id WHERE T1.full_name = 'Hunter Zolomon'

results.question: Among the members who incurred expenses in more than one event, who paid the most amount?
results.sql: SELECT T2.member_id FROM expense AS T1 INNER JOIN member AS T2 ON T1.link_to_member = T2.member_id INNER JOIN budget AS T3 ON T1.link_to_budget = T3.budget_id INNER JOIN event AS T4 ON T3.link_to_event = T4.event_id GROUP BY T2.member_id HAVING COUNT(DISTINCT T4.event_id) > 1 ORDER BY SUM(T1.cost) DESC LIMIT 1

results.question: Which customer paid the most in 2012/8/25?

results.question: List all outpatient within normal range of creatinine phosphokinase. Give me the distinct ids.

results.question: For the patient whose birthday was 1959/3/1, what symptoms did he/she have during the examination on 1993/9/27?

results.question: Give the total number of comments posted by user ID 13.
