List the elements of all the triple bonds.
results.sql: SELECT DISTINCT T3.element FROM bond AS T1 INNER JOIN connected AS T2 ON T1.bond_id = T2.bond_id INNER JOIN atom AS T3 ON T2.atom_id = T3.atom_id WHERE T1.bond_type = '#'

results.question: How many loan accounts are for pre-payment of duration of 24 months with weekly issuance of statement.
results.sql: SELECT COUNT(T2.account_id) FROM account AS T1 INNER JOIN loan AS T2 ON T1.account_id = T2.account_id WHERE T2.duration = 24 AND T1.frequency = 'POPLATEK TYDNE'

results.question: Find travel packages that include safaris and beaches with a packagePrice less than 1000. Also, count how many times each packageName appears in the results.
For all patients who are older than 55 years old, what is the percentage of female who has abnormal prothrombin time (PT)?
results.sql: SELECT CAST(SUM(CASE WHEN T2.PT >= 14 AND T1.SEX = 'F' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS REAL) * 100 / COUNT(*) FROM Patient AS T1 INNER JOIN Laboratory AS T2 ON T1.ID = T2.ID WHERE STRFTIME('%Y', CURRENT_TIMESTAMP) - STRFTIME('%Y', T1.Birthday) > 55

results.question: Identify all the atoms that are connected to the atoms of the TR181 molecule.
results.sql: SELECT T2.atom_id, T2.atom_id2 FROM atom AS T1 INNER JOIN connected AS T2 ON T2.atom_id = T1.atom_id WHERE T1.molecule_id = 'TR181'

results.question: How many superheroes have a neutral alignment?
results.sql: SELECT COUNT(T1.id) FROM superhero AS T1 INNER JOIN alignment AS T2 ON T1.alignment_id = T2.id WHERE T2.alignment = 'Neutral'

results.question: What are the currently enrolling courses related to 'machine learning applied techniques', and how is the enrollment status distributed across these courses by course title?
Find courses with a courseDuration of at least 20 hours and determine how many of these are currently enrolling by counting the boolean currentlyEnrolling field.
Give the name of the league had the most matches in the 2008/2009 season?
results.sql: SELECT t1.name FROM League AS t1 JOIN Match AS t2 ON t1.id = t2.league_id WHERE t2.season = '2008/2009' GROUP BY t1.name HAVING COUNT(t2.id) = (SELECT MAX(match_count) FROM (SELECT COUNT(t2.id) AS match_count FROM Match AS t2 WHERE t2.season = '2008/2009' GROUP BY t2.league_id))

results.question: For the patients with the normal glutamic pylvic transaminase level, how many of them are male?
results.sql: SELECT COUNT(T1.ID) FROM Patient AS T1 INNER JOIN Laboratory AS T2 ON T1.ID = T2.ID WHERE T2.GOT < 60 AND T1.SEX = 'M'

results.question: How many patients with a normal Ig A level came to the hospital after 1990/1/1?
results.sql: SELECT COUNT(T1.ID) FROM Patient AS T1 INNER JOIN Laboratory AS T2 ON T1.ID = T2.ID WHERE T2.IGA BETWEEN 80 AND 500 AND  strftime('%Y',  T1.`First Date`) > '1990'

results.question: How many molecules are carcinogenic and have the bromine element?
results.sql: SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT T2.molecule_id) FROM atom AS T1 INNER JOIN molecule AS T2 ON T1.molecule_id = T2.molecule_id WHERE T2.label = '+' AND T1.element = 'br'

results.question: In chartered schools with charter number 00D2, what are the names of all the administrators? Include the name of the school and the city to which it belongs
results.sql: SELECT AdmFName1, AdmLName1, School, City FROM schools WHERE Charter = 1 AND CharterNum = '00D2'

results.question: What was Lewis Hamilton's final rank in the 2008 Chinese Grand Prix?

additional_collections.role: holds race name and year to filter by 'Chinese Grand Prix' and 2008
holds driver's forename and surname to identify Lewis Hamilton
holds race name and year to filter by 'Chinese Grand Prix' and 2008
holds driver's forename and surname to identify Lewis Hamilton

results.sql: SELECT T2.positionOrder FROM races AS T1 INNER JOIN results AS T2 ON T2.raceId = T1.raceId INNER JOIN drivers AS T3 ON T3.driverId = T2.driverId WHERE T3.forename = 'Lewis' AND T3.surname = 'Hamilton' AND T1.name = 'Chinese Grand Prix' AND T1.year = 2008

results.question: Identify the total views on the post 'Computer Game Datasets'. Name the user who posted it last time.

additional_collections.role: holds the post text and user information
holds the post text and user information

results.sql: SELECT T2.ViewCount, T3.DisplayName FROM postHistory AS T1 INNER JOIN posts AS T2 ON T1.PostId = T2.Id INNER JOIN users AS T3 ON T2.LastEditorUserId = T3.Id WHERE T1.Text = 'Computer Game Datasets'

results.question: What are the museums, grouped by their names, that have exhibit highlights including renaissance art and are open today, along with the sum of their entry fees?
Please provide the full name of the away team that scored the most goals.

additional_collections.role: provides the full name of the away team
provides the full name of the away team

results.sql: SELECT t2.team_long_name FROM Match AS t1 INNER JOIN Team AS t2 ON t1.away_team_api_id = t2.team_api_id ORDER BY t1.away_team_goal DESC LIMIT 1

results.question: What language is the set of 180 cards that belongs to the Ravnica block translated into?

additional_collections.role: holds block and baseSetSize information for filtering
holds block and baseSetSize information for filtering

results.sql: SELECT T2.language FROM sets AS T1 INNER JOIN set_translations AS T2 ON T1.code = T2.setCode WHERE T1.block = 'Ravnica' AND T1.baseSetSize = 180

results.question: What's the magic card market name for the set which was released on 2017/6/9?
results.sql: SELECT mcmName FROM sets WHERE releaseDate = '2017-06-09'

results.question: How many schools in Fresno (directly funded) have number of test takers not more than 250?
results.sql: SELECT COUNT(T1.CDSCode) FROM frpm AS T1 INNER JOIN satscores AS T2 ON T1.CDSCode = T2.cds WHERE T1.`Charter Funding Type` = 'Directly funded' AND T1.`County Name` = 'Fresno' AND T2.NumTstTakr <= 250

results.question: What is the location of the owner of the post "Eliciting priors from experts"?
results.sql: SELECT T2.Location FROM posts AS T1 INNER JOIN users AS T2 ON T1.OwnerUserId = T2.Id WHERE T1.Title = 'Eliciting priors from experts'

results.question: Identify all courses that include 'Data Science' in their courseTitle, count how many of these courses are currentlyEnrolling, and group the results by courseDuration to show how courses of different durations are distributed.
Find the number of unique clinicName values from the Clinics collection where the description contains the word 'dental' by counting these occurrences.
Among the schools with the average score in Math over 560 in the SAT test, how many schools are directly charter-funded?
results.sql: SELECT COUNT(T2.`School Code`) FROM satscores AS T1 INNER JOIN frpm AS T2 ON T1.cds = T2.CDSCode WHERE T1.AvgScrMath > 560 AND T2.`Charter Funding Type` = 'Directly funded'

results.question: Name 10 users with the badge name 'Necromancer.'
results.sql: SELECT T1.DisplayName FROM users AS T1 INNER JOIN badges AS T2 ON T1.Id = T2.UserId WHERE T2.Name = 'Necromancer' LIMIT 10

results.question: List the skin colour of the superheroes with 100 attribute value.

additional_collections.role: holds attribute name to identify the 100 attribute value
holds attribute name to identify the 100 attribute value

results.sql: SELECT DISTINCT T2.colour FROM superhero AS T1 INNER JOIN colour AS T2 ON T1.skin_colour_id = T2.id INNER JOIN hero_attribute AS T3 ON T1.id = T3.hero_id WHERE T3.attribute_value = 100

results.question: How many female patients born in 1964 were admitted to the hospital? List them by ID.
results.sql: SELECT ID FROM Patient WHERE STRFTIME('%Y', Birthday) = '1964' AND SEX = 'F' AND Admission = '+'

results.question: What is the phone number and extension number for the school with the zip code 95203-3704? Indicate the school's name.
results.sql: SELECT Phone, Ext, School FROM schools WHERE Zip = '95203-3704'

results.question: Find exhibitions with descriptions about exploring the influence of Impressionism, where the averageVisitorCount is greater than 500, and count unique exhibition titles.
Who is the owner of the account with the largest loan amount?
results.sql: SELECT T1.client_id FROM disp AS T1 INNER JOIN account AS T3 ON T1.account_id = T3.account_id INNER JOIN loan AS T2 ON T3.account_id = T2.account_id WHERE T1.type = 'OWNER' ORDER BY T2.amount DESC LIMIT 1

results.question: Determine the average rating of all restaurants that are open now, filtering by the openNow property, and calculate the mean on the averageRating property.
What is the average age of the male patient with high cholesterol?
results.sql: SELECT AVG(STRFTIME('%Y', date('NOW')) - STRFTIME('%Y', T1.Birthday)) FROM Patient AS T1 INNER JOIN Laboratory AS T2 ON T1.ID = T2.ID WHERE T2.`T-CHO` >= 250 AND T1.SEX = 'M'

results.question: What college offers the major that Tyler Hewitt took?

additional_collections.role: holds student name to filter by
holds student name to filter by

results.sql: SELECT T2.college FROM member AS T1 INNER JOIN major AS T2 ON T1.link_to_major = T2.major_id WHERE T1.first_name = 'Tyler' AND T1.last_name = 'Hewitt'

results.question: Please list the exact dates on which a Formula_1 race took place on the Barcelona-Catalunya circuit.
results.sql: SELECT T2.date FROM circuits AS T1 INNER JOIN races AS T2 ON T2.circuitID = T1.circuitId WHERE T1.name = 'Circuit de Barcelona-Catalunya'

results.question: What is the monthly average number of schools that opened in Alameda County under the jurisdiction of the Elementary School District in 1980?
results.sql: SELECT CAST(COUNT(School) AS REAL) / 12 FROM schools WHERE DOC = 52 AND County = 'Alameda' AND strftime('%Y', OpenDate) = '1980'

results.question: Indicate the top source of funds received in September 2019 based on their amount.
results.sql: SELECT source FROM income WHERE date_received BETWEEN '2019-09-01' and '2019-09-30' ORDER BY source DESC LIMIT 1

results.question: What are the bond type and the atoms of the bond ID of TR001_6_9?

additional_collections.role: provides atom_id and atom_id2 for the bond
provides atom_id and atom_id2 for the bond

results.sql: SELECT T1.bond_type, T2.atom_id, T2.atom_id2 FROM bond AS T1 INNER JOIN connected AS T2 ON T1.bond_id = T2.bond_id WHERE T2.bond_id = 'TR001_6_9'

results.question: For all the set of cards that has Japanese translation, what is the percentage of them are only available in non-foil?
results.sql: SELECT CAST(SUM(CASE WHEN isNonFoilOnly = 1 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS REAL) * 100 / COUNT(id) FROM sets WHERE code IN ( SELECT setCode FROM set_translations WHERE language = 'Japanese' )

results.question: Please list the location coordinates of the US circuits.
results.sql: SELECT lat, lng FROM circuits WHERE country = 'USA'

results.question: Which user has a higher reputation, Harlan or Jarrod Dixon?
results.sql: SELECT DisplayName FROM users WHERE DisplayName IN ('Harlan', 'Jarrod Dixon') AND Reputation = ( SELECT MAX(Reputation) FROM users WHERE DisplayName IN ('Harlan', 'Jarrod Dixon') )

results.question: How many football players born after the 1990s have the first name "Aaron"?
results.sql: SELECT COUNT(id) FROM Player WHERE birthday > '1990' AND player_name LIKE 'Aaron%'

results.question: Find menu items with descriptions containing the word 'spicy' and determine the top three most common item names.
What is the height of the tallest player? Indicate his name.
results.sql: SELECT player_name FROM Player ORDER BY height DESC LIMIT 1

results.question: Which foreign language used by "A Pedra Fellwar"?
results.sql: SELECT DISTINCT language FROM foreign_data WHERE name = 'A Pedra Fellwar'

results.question: How many members of the Student_Club have major in 'Physics Teaching'?
results.sql: SELECT COUNT(T2.member_id) FROM major AS T1 INNER JOIN member AS T2 ON T1.major_id = T2.link_to_major WHERE T1.major_name = 'Physics Teaching'

results.question: What percentage of travel destinations, that match snowy mountains and vibrant city life descriptions, are currently popular among tourists?
Which home team had lost the fewest matches in the 2016 season?
results.sql: SELECT teamDetails.team_long_name FROM Match AS matchData INNER JOIN Team AS teamDetails ON matchData.home_team_api_id = teamDetails.team_api_id WHERE matchData.season = '2015/2016' AND matchData.home_team_goal - matchData.away_team_goal < 0 GROUP BY matchData.home_team_api_id ORDER BY COUNT(*) ASC LIMIT 1

results.question: Find all instructors with more than 5 years in yearsOfTeaching, show the count of tenured status and group the results by instructorName.
Among the patients with a normal blood glucose, how many of them don't have thrombosis?
results.sql: SELECT COUNT(T1.ID) FROM Patient AS T1 INNER JOIN Laboratory AS T2 ON T1.ID = T2.ID INNER JOIN Examination AS T3 ON T1.ID = T3.ID WHERE T2.GLU < 180 AND T3.Thrombosis = 0

results.question: Where can the introduction of the races held on Circuit de Barcelona-Catalunya be found?
results.sql: SELECT DISTINCT T1.url FROM circuits AS T1 INNER JOIN races AS T2 ON T2.circuitID = T1.circuitId WHERE T1.name = 'Circuit de Barcelona-Catalunya'

results.question: List ID, sex and date of birth of patient whose total protein (TP) below the lower range of the normal index.
results.sql: SELECT DISTINCT T1.ID, T1.SEX, T1.Birthday FROM Patient AS T1 INNER JOIN Laboratory AS T2 ON T1.ID = T2.ID WHERE T2.TP < 6.0

results.question: What is the percentage of the events that went over budget?
results.sql: SELECT CAST(SUM(CASE WHEN remaining < 0 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS REAL) * 100 / COUNT(budget_id) FROM budget

results.question: List the names of virtual schools that are among the top 5 in their respective counties based on average reading scores.
results.sql: SELECT School FROM (SELECT T2.School,T1.AvgScrRead, RANK() OVER (PARTITION BY T2.County ORDER BY T1.AvgScrRead DESC) AS rnk FROM satscores AS T1 INNER JOIN schools AS T2 ON T1.cds = T2.CDSCode WHERE T2.Virtual = 'F' ) ranked_schools WHERE rnk <= 5

results.question: What are the bonds that have phosphorus and nitrogen as their atom elements?
results.sql: SELECT T2.bond_id FROM atom AS T1 INNER JOIN connected AS T2 ON T1.atom_id = T2.atom_id WHERE T2.bond_id IN ( SELECT T3.bond_id FROM connected AS T3 INNER JOIN atom AS T4 ON T3.atom_id = T4.atom_id WHERE T4.element = 'p' ) AND T1.element = 'n'

results.question: What are the symptoms observed by the youngest patient to ever did a medical examination? Identify their diagnosis.

additional_collections.role: provides birthday to identify youngest patient
provides birthday to identify youngest patient

results.sql: SELECT T2.Symptoms, T1.Diagnosis FROM Patient AS T1 INNER JOIN Examination AS T2 ON T1.ID = T2.ID WHERE T2.Symptoms IS NOT NULL ORDER BY T1.Birthday DESC LIMIT 1

results.question: Give the publisher ID of Star Trek.
results.sql: SELECT id FROM publisher WHERE publisher_name = 'Star Trek'

results.question: List down at least five superpowers of male superheroes.
results.sql: SELECT T3.power_name FROM superhero AS T1 INNER JOIN hero_power AS T2 ON T1.id = T2.hero_id INNER JOIN superpower AS T3 ON T3.id = T2.power_id INNER JOIN gender AS T4 ON T4.id = T1.gender_id WHERE T4.gender = 'Male' LIMIT 5

results.question: Which country has more "value for money" gas stations? Please give a total number of "value for money" gas stations in each country.
results.sql: SELECT Country , ( SELECT COUNT(GasStationID) FROM gasstations WHERE Segment = 'Value for money' ) FROM gasstations WHERE Segment = 'Value for money' GROUP BY Country ORDER BY COUNT(GasStationID) DESC LIMIT 1

results.question: For all the club members from "Business" major, how many of them wear medium size t-shirt?
results.sql: SELECT COUNT(T1.member_id) FROM member AS T1 INNER JOIN major AS T2 ON T1.link_to_major = T2.major_id WHERE T2.major_name = 'Business' AND T1.t_shirt_size = 'Medium'

results.question: Which are the top ten withdrawals (non-credit card) by district names for the month of January 1996?
results.sql: SELECT DISTINCT T1.A2 FROM district AS T1 INNER JOIN account AS T2 ON T1.district_id = T2.district_id INNER JOIN trans AS T3 ON T2.account_id = T3.account_id WHERE T3.type = 'VYDAJ' AND T3.date LIKE '1996-01%' ORDER BY A2 ASC LIMIT 10

results.question: What is the highest monthly consumption in the year 2012?
results.sql: SELECT SUM(Consumption) FROM yearmonth WHERE SUBSTR(Date, 1, 4) = '2012' GROUP BY SUBSTR(Date, 5, 2) ORDER BY SUM(Consumption) DESC LIMIT 1

results.question: Please provide the names of top three football players who are over 180 cm tall in alphabetical order.
results.sql: SELECT player_name FROM Player WHERE height > 180 ORDER BY player_name LIMIT 3

results.question: Which user added a bounty amount of 50 to the post title mentioning variance?

additional_collections.role: holds the post title for filtering
provides the DisplayName of the user
holds the post title for filtering
provides the DisplayName of the user

results.sql: SELECT T3.DisplayName, T1.Title FROM posts AS T1 INNER JOIN votes AS T2 ON T1.Id = T2.PostId INNER JOIN users AS T3 ON T3.Id = T2.UserId WHERE T2.BountyAmount = 50 AND T1.Title LIKE '%variance%'

results.question: List out the name of badges that users obtained on 7/19/2010 7:39:08 PM.
results.sql: SELECT Name FROM badges WHERE Date = '2010-07-19 19:39:08.0'

results.question: What are the card layout of cards with keyword of flying?
results.sql: SELECT layout FROM cards WHERE keywords = 'Flying'

results.question: List all the sets available in Italian translation. State the total number of cards per set.
results.sql: SELECT T1.name, T1.totalSetSize FROM sets AS T1 INNER JOIN set_translations AS T2 ON T1.code = T2.setCode WHERE T2.language = 'Italian'

results.question: List emails of people who paid more than 20 dollars from 9/10/2019 to 11/19/2019.
results.sql: SELECT DISTINCT T1.email FROM member AS T1 INNER JOIN expense AS T2 ON T1.member_id = T2.link_to_member WHERE date(SUBSTR(T2.expense_date, 1, 10)) BETWEEN '2019-09-10' AND '2019-11-19' AND T2.cost > 20

results.question: Describe the last accessed date and location of the users who received the outliers badge.
results.sql: SELECT T1.LastAccessDate, T1.Location FROM users AS T1 INNER JOIN badges AS T2 ON T1.Id = T2.UserId WHERE T2.Name = 'outliers'

results.question: Please list the name of the cards in the set Coldsnap with the highest converted mana cost.
results.sql: SELECT T1.name FROM cards AS T1 INNER JOIN sets AS T2 ON T2.code = T1.setCode WHERE T2.name = 'Coldsnap' ORDER BY T1.convertedManaCost DESC LIMIT 1

results.question: Is it true that more SMEs pay in Czech koruna than in euros? If so, how many more?
results.sql: SELECT SUM(Currency = 'CZK') - SUM(Currency = 'EUR') FROM customers WHERE Segment = 'SME'

results.question: Identify clinics that specialize in pediatric care using semantic search, filter out only those with an averagePatientSatisfaction of 4.5 or higher, calculate the mean averagePatientSatisfaction, and group these results based on whether they are acceptingNewPatients.
Show me the season page of year when the race No. 901 took place.
results.sql: SELECT T2.url FROM races AS T1 INNER JOIN seasons AS T2 ON T2.year = T1.year WHERE T1.raceId = 901

results.question: Find museums with exhibits that have historical significance and are open today, and count the number of unique museum names.
Find instructors who have at least 10 yearsOfTeaching and determine the top 5 most common attributes mentioned in their biography.
Name chemical elements that form a bond TR001_10_11.
results.sql: SELECT T1.element FROM atom AS T1 INNER JOIN connected AS T2 ON T1.atom_id = T2.atom_id INNER JOIN bond AS T3 ON T2.bond_id = T3.bond_id WHERE T3.bond_id = 'TR001_10_11'

results.question: What is the element of toxicology for the atom with the ID of TR000_1?
results.sql: SELECT T.element FROM atom AS T WHERE T.atom_id = 'TR000_1'

results.question: Describe the post history counts and last edit date of the post title "What is the best introductory Bayesian statistics textbook?"
results.sql: SELECT T1.Id, T2.LastEditDate FROM postHistory AS T1 INNER JOIN posts AS T2 ON T1.PostId = T2.Id WHERE T2.Title = 'What is the best introductory Bayesian statistics textbook?'

results.question: What is the language of the "Battlebond" set?
results.sql: SELECT language FROM set_translations WHERE id IN ( SELECT id FROM sets WHERE name = 'Battlebond' )

results.question: How many patients have a normal anti-DNA level, yet their data are not recorded.
results.sql: SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT T1.ID) FROM Patient AS T1 INNER JOIN Laboratory AS T2 ON T1.ID = T2.ID WHERE T2.DNA < 8 AND T1.Description IS NULL

results.question: List the comments commented by the user with a username of Harvey Motulsky.
results.sql: SELECT T1.Text FROM comments AS T1 INNER JOIN users AS T2 ON T1.UserId = T2.Id WHERE T2.DisplayName = 'Harvey Motulsky'

results.question: Find clinics that are accepting new patients and calculate the mean of averagePatientSatisfaction scores for those clinics.
Among the cards whose version of frame style is 1997, what is the status of the card illustrated by D. Alexander Gregory in legacy play format that has sensitive content or Wizards of the Coast?
results.sql: SELECT DISTINCT T2.status FROM cards AS T1 INNER JOIN legalities AS T2 ON T2.uuid = T1.uuid WHERE T1.frameVersion = 1997 AND T1.hasContentWarning = 1 AND T1.artist = 'D. Alexander Gregory' AND T2.format = 'legacy'

results.question: For patients with alkaliphophatase (ALP) within normal range, were they treated as inpatient or outpatient?
results.sql: SELECT T1.Admission FROM Patient AS T1 INNER JOIN Laboratory AS T2 ON T1.ID = T2.ID WHERE T2.ALP < 300

results.question: What is the average age of patients as of year 1999 examined in the laboratory for the October of the year 1991?
results.sql: SELECT AVG('1999'  - STRFTIME('%Y', T2.Birthday)) FROM Laboratory AS T1 INNER JOIN Patient AS T2 ON T1.ID = T2.ID WHERE T1.Date BETWEEN '1991-10-01' AND '1991-10-30'

results.question: List the post IDs and badge names of the user Samuel in 2013.
results.sql: SELECT T1.PostId, T2.Name FROM postHistory AS T1 INNER JOIN badges AS T2 ON T1.UserId = T2.UserId WHERE T1.UserDisplayName = 'Samuel' AND STRFTIME('%Y', T1.CreationDate) = '2013' AND STRFTIME('%Y', T2.Date) = '2013'

results.question: Provide list of patients and their diagnosis with triglyceride (TG) index greater than 100 of the normal range?
results.sql: SELECT T1.ID, T1.Diagnosis FROM Patient AS T1 INNER JOIN Laboratory AS T2 ON T1.ID = T2.ID WHERE T2.TG > 300

results.question: Find cozy Italian restaurants with a great wine selection that are open now, and calculate the average rating of these open restaurants.

Find courses related to data science and machine learning by courseDescription, filter these courses to only those that are currently open for enrollment, count the unique course titles, and then group the courses by their duration to analyze the number of courses segmented by different durations.
Indicate the molecule id is belonging to the TR000_1_2 bond that has the first atom named TR000_1.
results.sql: SELECT T2.molecule_id, T2.bond_id, T1.atom_id FROM connected AS T1 INNER JOIN bond AS T2 ON T1.bond_id = T2.bond_id WHERE T1.atom_id = 'TR000_1' AND T2.bond_id = 'TR000_1_2'

results.question: Using the int_property_aggregation operator, calculate the total number of years of experience across all doctors by summing the 'yearsOfExperience' property in the Doctors collection.
On average, how much did the Student_Club spend on food for the typical event in the past?
results.sql: SELECT SUM(spent) / COUNT(spent) FROM budget WHERE category = 'Food' AND event_status = 'Closed'

results.question: What is the average writing score of each of the schools managed by Ricci Ulrich? List the schools and the corresponding average writing scores.

additional_collections.role: holds administrator names and school names
holds administrator names and school names

results.sql: SELECT T2.School, T1.AvgScrWrite FROM satscores AS T1 INNER JOIN schools AS T2 ON T1.cds = T2.CDSCode WHERE T2.AdmFName1 = 'Ricci' AND T2.AdmLName1 = 'Ulrich'

results.question: Find all cards illustrated by Stephen Daniel and describe the text of the ruling of these cards. State if these cards have missing or degraded properties and values.

output_properties.property_name: unique id number identifying the cards

results.sql: SELECT T1.id, T2.text, T1.hasContentWarning FROM cards AS T1 INNER JOIN rulings AS T2 ON T1.uuid = T2.uuid WHERE T1.artist = 'Stephen Daniele'

results.question: What is the description about the ruling of card "Condemn"?
results.sql: SELECT T2.text FROM cards AS T1 INNER JOIN rulings AS T2 ON T1.uuid = T2.uuid WHERE T1.name = 'Condemn'

results.question: Which county reported the most number of school closure in the 1980s with school wonership code belonging to Youth Authority Facilities (CEA)?

additional_collections.role: holds school closure dates and SOC code
holds school closure dates and SOC code

results.sql: SELECT County FROM schools WHERE strftime('%Y', ClosedDate) BETWEEN '1980' AND '1989' AND StatusType = 'Closed' AND SOC = 11 GROUP BY County ORDER BY COUNT(School) DESC LIMIT 1

results.question: List out the account numbers of clients who are youngest and have highest average salary?
results.sql: SELECT T1.account_id  FROM account AS T1 INNER JOIN disp AS T2 ON T1.account_id = T2.account_id INNER JOIN client AS T3 ON T2.client_id = T3.client_id INNER JOIN district AS T4 on T4.district_id = T1.district_id WHERE T2.client_id = ( SELECT client_id FROM client ORDER BY birth_date DESC LIMIT 1) GROUP BY T4.A11, T1.account_id

results.question: Find all clinics where acceptingNewPatients is true, and count how many different clinics share the same description.
List the account IDs with monthly issuance of statements.
results.sql: SELECT account_id FROM account WHERE Frequency = 'POPLATEK MESICNE'

results.question: Please provide links to events for members who have paid more than 50 dollar.
results.sql: SELECT DISTINCT T3.link_to_event FROM expense AS T1 INNER JOIN member AS T2 ON T1.link_to_member = T2.member_id INNER JOIN attendance AS T3 ON T2.member_id = T3.link_to_member WHERE T1.cost > 50

results.question: Who was the champion of 2008's Australian Grand Prix and where can I know more about him?
results.sql: SELECT T1.forename, T1.surname, T1.url FROM drivers AS T1 INNER JOIN results AS T2 ON T1.driverId = T2.driverId INNER JOIN races AS T3 ON T3.raceId = T2.raceId WHERE T3.name = 'Australian Grand Prix' AND T2.time LIKE '_:%:__.___' AND T3.year = 2008

results.question: What is the gender of Agent 13 hero?
results.sql: SELECT T2.gender FROM superhero AS T1 INNER JOIN gender AS T2 ON T1.gender_id = T2.id WHERE T1.superhero_name = 'Agent 13'

results.question: Indicate the full names of the top 10 players with the highest number of penalties.
results.sql: SELECT t2.player_name FROM Player_Attributes AS t1 INNER JOIN Player AS t2 ON t1.id = t2.id ORDER BY t1.penalties DESC LIMIT 10

results.question: What's the reference name of Marina Bay Street Circuit?
results.sql: SELECT circuitRef FROM circuits WHERE name = 'Marina Bay Street Circuit'

results.question: Write the full names of students who received funds on the date of 9/9/2019 and include the amount received.
results.sql: SELECT DISTINCT T3.first_name, T3.last_name, T4.amount FROM event AS T1 INNER JOIN attendance AS T2 ON T1.event_id = T2.link_to_event INNER JOIN member AS T3 ON T3.member_id = T2.link_to_member INNER JOIN income AS T4 ON T4.link_to_member = T3.member_id WHERE T4.date_received = '2019-09-09'

results.question: What is the publisher's name of Blue Beetle II?
results.sql: SELECT T2.publisher_name FROM superhero AS T1 INNER JOIN publisher AS T2 ON T1.publisher_id = T2.id WHERE T1.superhero_name = 'Blue Beetle II'

results.question: Calculate the average height for each superhero.
results.sql: SELECT CAST(SUM(height_cm) AS REAL) / COUNT(id) FROM superhero

results.question: How many superheroes are published by Marvel Comics?
results.sql: SELECT COUNT(T1.id) FROM superhero AS T1 INNER JOIN publisher AS T2 ON T1.publisher_id = T2.id WHERE T2.publisher_name = 'Marvel Comics'

results.question: What are the cards for set OGW? State the colour for these cards.
results.sql: SELECT id, colors FROM cards WHERE id IN ( SELECT id FROM set_translations WHERE setCode = 'OGW' )

results.question: What is the preferred foot when attacking of the player with the lowest potential?
results.sql: SELECT preferred_foot FROM Player_Attributes WHERE potential IS NOT NULL ORDER BY potential ASC LIMIT 1

results.question: What are the atoms that can bond with the atom that has the element lead?
results.sql: SELECT T2.atom_id, T2.atom_id2 FROM atom AS T1 INNER JOIN connected AS T2 ON T1.atom_id = T2.atom_id WHERE T1.element = 'pb'

results.question: Calculate the average view count of each post tagged as 'humor' and list the title and the comment of each post.
results.sql: SELECT AVG(T2.ViewCount), T2.Title, T1.Text FROM comments AS T1 INNER JOIN posts AS T2 ON T2.Id = T1.PostId  WHERE T2.Tags = '<humor>' GROUP BY T2.Title, T1.Text

results.question: Find doctors with at least 10 years of experience and group results by whether they are currently practicing.
List down the bond type for molecules from molecule id TR000 to TR050.
results.sql: SELECT T2.molecule_id, T2.bond_type FROM molecule AS T1 INNER JOIN bond AS T2 ON T1.molecule_id = T2.molecule_id WHERE T1.molecule_id BETWEEN 'TR000' AND 'TR050'

results.question: Tell the hometown county for "Adela O'Gallagher".
results.sql: SELECT T2.county FROM member AS T1 INNER JOIN zip_code AS T2 ON T1.zip = T2.zip_code WHERE T1.first_name = 'Adela' AND T1.last_name = 'O''Gallagher'

results.question: For the customer who paid 634.8 in 2012/8/25, what was the consumption decrease rate from Year 2012 to 2013?
results.sql: SELECT CAST(SUM(IIF(SUBSTR(Date, 1, 4) = '2012', Consumption, 0)) - SUM(IIF(SUBSTR(Date, 1, 4) = '2013', Consumption, 0)) AS FLOAT) / SUM(IIF(SUBSTR(Date, 1, 4) = '2012', Consumption, 0)) FROM yearmonth WHERE CustomerID = ( SELECT T1.CustomerID FROM transactions_1k AS T1 INNER JOIN gasstations AS T2 ON T1.GasStationID = T2.GasStationID WHERE T1.Date = '2012-08-25' AND T1.Price = 634.8 )

results.question: Find restaurants similar to a cozy Italian restaurant with a great wine selection, include only those whose name contains 'Grill', and count how many of them are currently open.

additional_collections.role: holds name and openNow properties for filtering and counting
holds name and openNow properties for filtering and counting

query_args.search_query: cozy Italian restaurant with a great wine selection

results.question: List the full name of the Student_Club members that grew up in Illinois state.
results.sql: SELECT T1.first_name, T1.last_name FROM member AS T1 INNER JOIN zip_code AS T2 ON T1.zip = T2.zip_code WHERE T2.state = 'Illinois'

results.question: What is the school type of the school with the highest latitude? Indicate the name of the school as well as the latitude coordinates.
results.sql: SELECT T1.`School Type`, T1.`School Name`, T2.Latitude FROM frpm AS T1 INNER JOIN schools AS T2 ON T1.CDSCode = T2.CDSCode ORDER BY T2.Latitude DESC LIMIT 1

results.question: List out the age of users who located in Vienna, Austria obtained the badge?
results.sql: SELECT T1.Age FROM users AS T1 INNER JOIN badges AS T2 ON T1.Id = T2.UserId WHERE T1.Location = 'Vienna, Austria'

results.question: Among the users who obtained the "Teacher" badge, calculate their percentage of users

holds total user count for percentage calculation

results.sql: SELECT CAST(COUNT(T1.Id) AS REAL) * 100 / (SELECT COUNT(Id) FROM users) FROM users AS T1 INNER JOIN badges AS T2 ON T1.Id = T2.UserId WHERE T2.Name = 'Teacher'

results.question: What is the hero's full name with the highest attribute in strength?
results.sql: SELECT T1.full_name FROM superhero AS T1 INNER JOIN hero_attribute AS T2 ON T1.id = T2.hero_id INNER JOIN attribute AS T3 ON T2.attribute_id = T3.id WHERE T3.attribute_name = 'Strength' ORDER BY T2.attribute_value DESC LIMIT 1

results.question: List all the members of the "School of Applied Sciences, Technology and Education" department.
results.sql: SELECT T1.first_name, T1.last_name FROM member AS T1 INNER JOIN major AS T2 ON T1.link_to_major = T2.major_id WHERE T2.department = 'School of Applied Sciences, Technology and Education'

results.question: Among all chemical compounds identified in the database, what percent of compounds form a triple-bond.
results.sql: SELECT CAST(COUNT(CASE WHEN T.bond_type = '#' THEN T.bond_id ELSE NULL END) AS REAL) * 100 / COUNT(T.bond_id) FROM bond AS T

results.question: What are the name of badges that users who have the lowest reputation obtained?

additional_collections.role: holds reputation values to find the lowest
holds reputation values to find the lowest

results.sql: SELECT T2.Name FROM users AS T1 INNER JOIN badges AS T2 ON T1.Id = T2.UserId WHERE T1.Reputation = (SELECT MIN(Reputation) FROM users)

results.question: What is the superpower of hero ID 56?
results.sql: SELECT T2.power_name FROM hero_power AS T1 INNER JOIN superpower AS T2 ON T1.power_id = T2.id WHERE T1.hero_id = 56

results.question: What is the foreign name of the card in French of type Creature, normal layout and black border color, by artist Matthew D. Wilson?
results.sql: SELECT name FROM foreign_data WHERE uuid IN ( SELECT uuid FROM cards WHERE types = 'Creature' AND layout = 'normal' AND borderColor = 'black' AND artist = 'Matthew D. Wilson' ) AND language = 'French'

results.question: In Los Angeles how many schools have more than 500 free meals but less than 700 free or reduced price meals for K-12?
results.sql: SELECT COUNT(CDSCode) FROM frpm WHERE `County Name` = 'Los Angeles' AND `Free Meal Count (K-12)` > 500 AND `FRPM Count (K-12)`< 700

results.question: How many cards that illusrtated in German have been reprinted?
results.sql: SELECT COUNT(T1.id) FROM cards AS T1 INNER JOIN foreign_data AS T2 ON T1.uuid = T2.uuid WHERE T2.language = 'German' AND T1.isReprint = 1

results.question: What is the rate of drivers completing all the laps in the 2008 Australian Grand Prix?
results.sql: SELECT CAST(SUM(IIF(T1.time IS NOT NULL, 1, 0)) AS REAL) * 100 / COUNT(T1.resultId) FROM results AS T1 INNER JOIN races AS T2 ON T1.raceId = T2.raceId WHERE T2.name = 'Australian Grand Prix' AND T2.year = 2008

results.question: How many users whose reputations are higher than 2000 and the number of views is higher than 1000?
results.sql: SELECT COUNT(id) FROM users WHERE Reputation > 2000 AND Views > 1000

results.question: Find destinations whose descriptions semantically emphasize beautiful landscapes, specifically retrieve destinations named "Bora Bora", and determine the maximum average visit cost among all destinations.
Among the patients whose level of Hematoclit isn't normal, which patient has the highest anti-Cardiolipin antibody concentration? Please list his or her ID.
results.sql: SELECT DISTINCT T1.ID FROM Patient AS T1 INNER JOIN Examination AS T2 ON T1.ID = T2.ID INNER JOIN Laboratory AS T3 on T1.ID = T3.ID WHERE (T3.HCT >= 52 OR T3.HCT <= 29) ORDER BY T2.`aCL IgA` DESC LIMIT 1

results.question: Among the posts with views ranging from 100 to 150, what is the comment with the highest score?
results.sql: SELECT Text FROM comments WHERE PostId IN ( SELECT Id FROM posts WHERE ViewCount BETWEEN 100 AND 150 ) ORDER BY Score DESC LIMIT 1

results.question: Which football player has the shortest height?
results.sql: SELECT player_name FROM player ORDER BY height ASC LIMIT 1

results.question: How many elements are contained in bond_id TR001_3_4?

results.question: What's the Italian name of the set of cards with "Ancestor's Chosen" is in?
results.sql: SELECT translation FROM set_translations WHERE setCode IN ( SELECT setCode FROM cards WHERE name = 'Ancestor''s Chosen' ) AND language = 'Italian'

results.question: How many accounts in Beroun were opened after 1996?
results.sql: SELECT COUNT(account_id) FROM account AS T1 INNER JOIN district AS T2 ON T1.district_id = T2.district_id WHERE STRFTIME('%Y', T1.date) > '1996' AND T2.A2 = 'Beroun'

results.question: What atoms comprise TR186?

results.question: Find appointments related to annual health check-ups by searching in appointmentNotes for 'check-up', and count how many of these appointments are confirmed.
List down top 3 German drivers who has the shortest average pit stop duration and were born between 1980-1985.
results.sql: SELECT T2.forename, T2.surname FROM pitStops AS T1 INNER JOIN drivers AS T2 on T1.driverId = T2.driverId WHERE T2.nationality = 'German' AND STRFTIME('%Y', T2.dob) BETWEEN '1980' AND '1985' GROUP BY T2.forename, T2.surname ORDER BY AVG(T1.duration) LIMIT 3

results.question: Provide the eye colour of the superhero who has Karen Beecher-Duncan as their full name.

results.question: Which student was able to generate income more than $40?

results.question: Which molecule does the atom TR001_10 belong to? Please state whether this molecule is carcinogenic or not.

additional_collections.role: provides molecule_id and label for carcinogenicity
provides molecule_id and label for carcinogenicity

results.sql: SELECT T2.molecule_id , IIF(T2.label = '+', 'YES', 'NO') AS flag_carcinogenic FROM atom AS T1 INNER JOIN molecule AS T2 ON T1.molecule_id = T2.molecule_id WHERE T1.atom_id = 'TR001_10'

results.question: Between DC and Marvel Comics, which publisher has published more superheroes? Find the difference in the number of superheroes they have published.
results.sql: SELECT SUM(CASE WHEN T2.publisher_name = 'Marvel Comics' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) - SUM(CASE WHEN T2.publisher_name = 'DC Comics' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) FROM superhero AS T1 INNER JOIN publisher AS T2 ON T1.publisher_id = T2.id

results.question: Please list the accounts whose district is Tabor that are eligible for loans.

results.question: What is the mana cost of cards with a normal layout, a 2003 frame version, with a black border color, and available in paper and mtgo?

results.question: What is the average height of the superheroes from Marvel Comics?
results.sql: SELECT AVG(T1.height_cm) FROM superhero AS T1 INNER JOIN publisher AS T2 ON T1.publisher_id = T2.id WHERE T2.publisher_name = 'Marvel Comics'

results.question: Which non-carcinogenic molecules consisted more than 5 atoms?
results.sql: SELECT T.molecule_id FROM ( SELECT T1.molecule_id, COUNT(T2.atom_id) FROM molecule AS T1 INNER JOIN atom AS T2 ON T1.molecule_id = T2.molecule_id WHERE T1.label = '-' GROUP BY T1.molecule_id HAVING COUNT(T2.atom_id) > 5 ) t

results.question: Among the accounts who have loan validity more than 12 months, list out the accounts that have the highest approved amount and have account opening date in 1993.

results.sql: SELECT T1.account_id FROM loan AS T1 INNER JOIN account AS T2 ON T1.account_id = T2.account_id WHERE STRFTIME('%Y', T2.date) = '1993' AND T1.duration > 12 ORDER BY T1.amount DESC LIMIT 1

results.question: Tell the defensive work rate for Kevin Berigaud on 2013/2/22.
results.sql: SELECT t2.defensive_work_rate FROM Player AS t1 INNER JOIN Player_Attributes AS t2 ON t1.player_fifa_api_id = t2.player_fifa_api_id WHERE SUBSTR(t2.`date`, 1, 10) = '2013-02-22' AND t1.player_name = 'Kevin Berigaud'

results.question: List the name of leagues in which the average goals by the home team is higher than the away team in the 2009/2010 season.
results.sql: SELECT t1.name FROM League AS t1 INNER JOIN Match AS t2 ON t1.id = t2.league_id WHERE t2.season = '2009/2010' GROUP BY t1.name HAVING (CAST(SUM(t2.home_team_goal) AS REAL) / COUNT(DISTINCT t2.id)) - (CAST(SUM(t2.away_team_goal) AS REAL) / COUNT(DISTINCT t2.id)) > 0

results.question: What is the average time in seconds of champion for each year, before year 1975?
results.sql: WITH time_in_seconds AS ( SELECT T2.year, T2.raceId, T1.positionOrder, CASE WHEN T1.positionOrder = 1 THEN (CAST(SUBSTR(T1.time, 1, 1) AS REAL) * 3600) + (CAST(SUBSTR(T1.time, 3, 2) AS REAL) * 60) + CAST(SUBSTR(T1.time, 6,2) AS REAL )   + CAST(SUBSTR(T1.time, 9) AS REAL)/1000 ELSE 0 END AS time_seconds FROM results AS T1 INNER JOIN races AS T2 ON T1.raceId = T2.raceId WHERE T1.time IS NOT NULL ), champion_time AS ( SELECT year, raceId, time_seconds FROM time_in_seconds WHERE positionOrder = 1 ) SELECT year, AVG(time_seconds) FROM champion_time WHERE year < 1975 GROUP BY year HAVING AVG(time_seconds) IS NOT NULL

results.question: List all the football player with the highest potential score.
results.sql: SELECT DISTINCT(t1.player_name) FROM Player AS t1 INNER JOIN Player_Attributes AS t2 ON t1.player_api_id = t2.player_api_id WHERE t2.potential = (SELECT MAX(potential) FROM Player_Attributes)

results.question: List the hero ID of superheroes have intellegence as their power.

results.question: List out all post that are related to post ID 61217 and what is the popularity of this post?

results.question: Of the schools with a mailing state address in California, what is the ratio of the schools located in the county of Colusa against the school located in the county of Humboldt?

results.question: Give the event ID, location, and status of events conducted from November 2019 to March 2020.

results.question: Which top 20 driver created the shortest lap time ever record in a Formula_1 race? Please give them full names.
results.sql: WITH lap_times_in_seconds AS (SELECT driverId, (CASE WHEN SUBSTR(time, 1, INSTR(time, ':') - 1) <> '' THEN CAST(SUBSTR(time, 1, INSTR(time, ':') - 1) AS REAL) * 60 ELSE 0 END + CASE WHEN SUBSTR(time, INSTR(time, ':') + 1, INSTR(time, '.') - INSTR(time, ':') - 1) <> '' THEN CAST(SUBSTR(time, INSTR(time, ':') + 1, INSTR(time, '.') - INSTR(time, ':') - 1) AS REAL) ELSE 0 END + CASE WHEN SUBSTR(time, INSTR(time, '.') + 1) <> '' THEN CAST(SUBSTR(time, INSTR(time, '.') + 1) AS REAL) / 1000 ELSE 0 END) AS time_in_seconds FROM lapTimes) SELECT T2.forename, T2.surname, T1.driverId FROM (SELECT driverId, MIN(time_in_seconds) AS min_time_in_seconds FROM lap_times_in_seconds GROUP BY driverId) AS T1 INNER JOIN drivers AS T2 ON T1.driverId = T2.driverId ORDER BY T1.min_time_in_seconds ASC LIMIT 20

holds frequency information for monthly statement issuance

results.question: List all the elements of atoms that can not bond with any other atoms.

results.question: Calculate the percentage of molecules containing carcinogenic compounds that element is hydrogen.

results.question: How many male patients have elevated total bilirubin count?

results.question: Which district has the most accounts with loan contracts finished with no problems?

identifies the Austrian Grand Prix Circuit

results.sql: WITH fastest_lap_times AS ( SELECT T1.raceId, T1.driverId, T1.FastestLapTime, (CAST(SUBSTR(T1.FastestLapTime, 1, INSTR(T1.FastestLapTime, ':') - 1) AS REAL) * 60) + (CAST(SUBSTR(T1.FastestLapTime, INSTR(T1.FastestLapTime, ':') + 1, INSTR(T1.FastestLapTime, '.') - INSTR(T1.FastestLapTime, ':') - 1) AS REAL)) + (CAST(SUBSTR(T1.FastestLapTime, INSTR(T1.FastestLapTime, '.') + 1) AS REAL) / 1000) as time_in_seconds FROM results AS T1 WHERE T1.FastestLapTime IS NOT NULL), lap_record_race AS ( SELECT T1.raceId, T1.driverId FROM results AS T1 INNER JOIN races AS T2 on T1.raceId = T2.raceId INNER JOIN circuits AS T3 on T2.circuitId = T3.circuitId INNER JOIN ( SELECT MIN(fastest_lap_times.time_in_seconds) as min_time_in_seconds FROM fastest_lap_times INNER JOIN races AS T2 on fastest_lap_times.raceId = T2.raceId INNER JOIN circuits AS T3 on T2.circuitId = T3.circuitId WHERE T2.name = 'Austrian Grand Prix') AS T4 ON (CAST(SUBSTR(T1.FastestLapTime, 1, INSTR(T1.FastestLapTime, ':') - 1) AS REAL) * 60) + (CAST(SUBSTR(T1.FastestLapTime, INSTR(T1.FastestLapTime, ':') + 1, INSTR(T1.FastestLapTime, '.') - INSTR(T1.FastestLapTime, ':') - 1) AS REAL)) + (CAST(SUBSTR(T1.FastestLapTime, INSTR(T1.FastestLapTime, '.') + 1) AS REAL) / 1000) = T4.min_time_in_seconds WHERE T2.name = 'Austrian Grand Prix') SELECT T4.duration FROM lap_record_race INNER JOIN pitStops AS T4 on lap_record_race.raceId = T4.raceId AND lap_record_race.driverId = T4.driverId

results.question: How many tags have post count between 5,000 to 7,000?

results.question: State the name of major that Vice President has joined.

results.question: Among the bad superheroes, what is the percentage of female superheroes?

results.question: Please list all the transactions made by accounts from district 5.

results.question: On average how many carcinogenic molecules are single bonded?
results.sql: SELECT AVG(single_bond_count) FROM (SELECT T3.molecule_id, COUNT(T1.bond_type) AS single_bond_count FROM bond AS T1  INNER JOIN atom AS T2 ON T1.molecule_id = T2.molecule_id INNER JOIN molecule AS T3 ON T3.molecule_id = T2.molecule_id WHERE T1.bond_type = '-' AND T3.label = '+' GROUP BY T3.molecule_id) AS subquery

results.question: What are the bond type for atoms with element Tin?
results.sql: SELECT DISTINCT T3.bond_type FROM atom AS T1 INNER JOIN connected AS T2 ON T1.atom_id = T2.atom_id INNER JOIN bond AS T3 ON T3.bond_id = T2.bond_id WHERE T1.element = 'sn'

results.question: Rank superheroes from Marvel Comics by their eye color popularity, starting with the most common color.

results.question: What percentage is Landon Donovan's overall rating higher than Jordan Bowery on 2013/7/12?

provides player names to match Landon Donovan and Jordan Bowery

results.sql: SELECT (SUM(CASE WHEN t1.player_name = 'Landon Donovan' THEN t2.overall_rating ELSE 0 END) * 1.0 - SUM(CASE WHEN t1.player_name = 'Jordan Bowery' THEN t2.overall_rating ELSE 0 END)) * 100 / SUM(CASE WHEN t1.player_name = 'Landon Donovan' THEN t2.overall_rating ELSE 0 END) LvsJ_percent FROM Player AS t1 INNER JOIN Player_Attributes AS t2 ON t1.player_fifa_api_id = t2.player_fifa_api_id WHERE SUBSTR(t2.`date`, 1, 10) = '2013-07-12'

results.question: In which Formula_1 race was the lap record for the Austrian Grand Prix Circuit set?
results.sql: WITH fastest_lap_times AS ( SELECT T1.raceId, T1.FastestLapTime, (CAST(SUBSTR(T1.FastestLapTime, 1, INSTR(T1.FastestLapTime, ':') - 1) AS REAL) * 60) + (CAST(SUBSTR(T1.FastestLapTime, INSTR(T1.FastestLapTime, ':') + 1, INSTR(T1.FastestLapTime, '.') - INSTR(T1.FastestLapTime, ':') - 1) AS REAL)) + (CAST(SUBSTR(T1.FastestLapTime, INSTR(T1.FastestLapTime, '.') + 1) AS REAL) / 1000) as time_in_seconds FROM results AS T1 WHERE T1.FastestLapTime IS NOT NULL ) SELECT T2.name FROM races AS T2 INNER JOIN circuits AS T3 on T2.circuitId = T3.circuitId INNER JOIN results AS T1 on T2.raceId = T1.raceId INNER JOIN ( SELECT MIN(fastest_lap_times.time_in_seconds) as min_time_in_seconds FROM fastest_lap_times INNER JOIN races AS T2 on fastest_lap_times.raceId = T2.raceId INNER JOIN circuits AS T3 on T2.circuitId = T3.circuitId WHERE T2.name = 'Austrian Grand Prix') AS T4 ON (CAST(SUBSTR(T1.FastestLapTime, 1, INSTR(T1.FastestLapTime, ':') - 1) AS REAL) * 60) + (CAST(SUBSTR(T1.FastestLapTime, INSTR(T1.FastestLapTime, ':') + 1, INSTR(T1.FastestLapTime, '.') - INSTR(T1.FastestLapTime, ':') - 1) AS REAL)) + (CAST(SUBSTR(T1.FastestLapTime, INSTR(T1.FastestLapTime, '.') + 1) AS REAL) / 1000) = T4.min_time_in_seconds WHERE T2.name = 'Austrian Grand Prix'

results.question: What is the difference in the annual average consumption of the customers with the least amount of consumption paid in CZK for 2013 between SME and LAM, LAM and KAM, and KAM and SME?
results.sql: SELECT CAST(SUM(IIF(T1.Segment = 'SME', T2.Consumption, 0)) AS REAL) / COUNT(T1.CustomerID) - CAST(SUM(IIF(T1.Segment = 'LAM', T2.Consumption, 0)) AS REAL) / COUNT(T1.CustomerID) , CAST(SUM(IIF(T1.Segment = 'LAM', T2.Consumption, 0)) AS REAL) / COUNT(T1.CustomerID) - CAST(SUM(IIF(T1.Segment = 'KAM', T2.Consumption, 0)) AS REAL) / COUNT(T1.CustomerID) , CAST(SUM(IIF(T1.Segment = 'KAM', T2.Consumption, 0)) AS REAL) / COUNT(T1.CustomerID) - CAST(SUM(IIF(T1.Segment = 'SME', T2.Consumption, 0)) AS REAL) / COUNT(T1.CustomerID) FROM customers AS T1 INNER JOIN yearmonth AS T2 ON T1.CustomerID = T2.CustomerID WHERE T1.Currency = 'CZK' AND T2.Consumption = ( SELECT MIN(Consumption) FROM yearmonth ) AND T2.Date BETWEEN 201301 AND 201312

results.question: Which of the three segments—SME, LAM and KAM—has the biggest and lowest percentage increases in consumption paid in EUR between 2012 and 2013?

provides atom details for molecule context

results.sql: SELECT T.molecule_id FROM ( SELECT T3.molecule_id, COUNT(T1.bond_type) FROM bond AS T1 INNER JOIN molecule AS T3 ON T1.molecule_id = T3.molecule_id WHERE T3.label = '+' AND T1.bond_type = '=' GROUP BY T3.molecule_id ORDER BY COUNT(T1.bond_type) DESC LIMIT 1 ) AS T

results.question: What is the administrator's email address of the chartered school with the fewest students enrolled in grades 1 through 12?
results.sql: SELECT T2.AdmEmail1 FROM frpm AS T1 INNER JOIN schools AS T2 ON T1.CDSCode = T2.CDSCode WHERE T1.`Charter School (Y/N)` = 1 ORDER BY T1.`Enrollment (K-12)` ASC LIMIT 1

results.question: Provide the heights of the heroes whose eye colours are amber.
results.sql: SELECT T1.height_cm FROM superhero AS T1 INNER JOIN colour AS T2 ON T1.eye_colour_id = T2.id WHERE T2.colour = 'Amber'

results.question: Provide the ID, sex, birthday of all patients diagnosed with 'RA' that are within the UN normal index.
results.sql: SELECT DISTINCT T1.ID, T1.SEX, T1.Birthday FROM Patient AS T1 INNER JOIN Laboratory AS T2 ON T1.ID = T2.ID WHERE T2.UN < 30 AND T1.Diagnosis = 'RA'

results.question: What is the display name of the user who is the owner of the most valuable post?
results.sql: SELECT T2.DisplayName FROM posts AS T1 INNER JOIN users AS T2 ON T1.OwnerUserId = T2.Id ORDER BY T1.FavoriteCount DESC LIMIT 1

results.question: How many accidents did the driver who had the highest number accidents in the Canadian Grand Prix have?

additional_collections.role: identifies the Canadian Grand Prix race
identifies the Canadian Grand Prix race

results.sql: SELECT COUNT(T1.driverId) FROM results AS T1 INNER JOIN races AS T2 on T1.raceId = T2.raceId INNER JOIN status AS T3 on T1.statusId = T3.statusId WHERE T3.statusId = 3 AND T2.name = 'Canadian Grand Prix' GROUP BY T1.driverId ORDER BY COUNT(T1.driverId) DESC LIMIT 1

results.question: Among the patients with a normal Ig G level, how many of them have symptoms?
results.sql: SELECT COUNT(T1.ID) FROM Patient AS T1 INNER JOIN Laboratory AS T2 ON T1.ID = T2.ID INNER JOIN Examination AS T3 ON T3.ID = T2.ID WHERE T2.IGG BETWEEN 900 AND 2000 AND T3.Symptoms IS NOT NULL

results.question: How much, in total, did client number 617 pay for all of the transactions in 1998?
results.sql: SELECT SUM(T3.amount) FROM client AS T1 INNER JOIN disp AS T4 ON T1.client_id = T4.client_id INNER JOIN account AS T2 ON T4.account_id = T2.account_id INNER JOIN trans AS T3 ON T2.account_id = T3.account_id WHERE STRFTIME('%Y', T3.date)= '1998' AND T1.client_id = 617

results.question: What is the type of card "Benalish Knight"?
results.sql: SELECT DISTINCT T1.type FROM cards AS T1 INNER JOIN foreign_data AS T2 ON T1.uuid = T2.uuid WHERE T1.name = 'Benalish Knight'

results.question: Which foot is preferred by Abdou Diallo?
results.sql: SELECT DISTINCT t2.preferred_foot FROM Player AS t1 INNER JOIN Player_Attributes AS t2 ON t1.player_api_id = t2.player_api_id WHERE t1.player_name = 'Abdou Diallo'

results.question: How many accounts who have region in Prague are eligible for loans?
results.sql: SELECT COUNT(T1.account_id) FROM account AS T1 INNER JOIN loan AS T2 ON T1.account_id = T2.account_id INNER JOIN district AS T3 ON T1.district_id = T3.district_id WHERE T3.A3 = 'Prague'

results.question: Find clinics where the description includes 'cancer', and determine how many of these clinics are accepting new patients.
List down two molecule id of triple bond non carcinogenic molecules with element carbon.

additional_collections.role: holds label to filter non-carcinogenic molecules
holds label to filter non-carcinogenic molecules

results.sql: SELECT DISTINCT T2.molecule_id FROM atom AS T1 INNER JOIN molecule AS T2 ON T1.molecule_id = T2.molecule_id INNER JOIN bond AS T3 ON T2.molecule_id = T3.molecule_id WHERE T3.bond_type = '#' AND T1.element = 'c' AND T2.label = '-'

results.question: What are the name of badge that users who have the highest reputation obtained?

additional_collections.role: holds reputation values to find the highest
holds reputation values to find the highest

results.sql: SELECT T2.name FROM users AS T1 INNER JOIN badges AS T2 ON T1.Id = T2.UserId ORDER BY T1.Reputation DESC LIMIT 1

results.question: What are the colors of cards from ID 1-20? What are the format of these cards?
results.sql: SELECT T1.colors, T2.format FROM cards AS T1 INNER JOIN legalities AS T2 ON T1.uuid = T2.uuid WHERE T1.id BETWEEN 1 AND 20

results.question: What is the average total price of the transactions taken place in January, 2012?
results.sql: SELECT AVG(Amount) FROM transactions_1k WHERE Date LIKE '2012-01%'

results.question: How many double bonds does TR006 have and is it carcinogenic?
results.sql: SELECT COUNT(T1.bond_id), T2.label FROM bond AS T1 INNER JOIN molecule AS T2 ON T1.molecule_id = T2.molecule_id WHERE T1.bond_type = '=' AND T2.molecule_id = 'TR006' GROUP BY T2.label

results.question: Find restaurants with a cozy ambiance and Italian cuisine, where the average rating is at least 4, count how many such restaurants there are, and group them by whether they are currently open or not.
Which of the play format has the highest number of banned status? Indicate the play format and the names of all the card meet the condition.
results.sql: WITH MaxBanned AS (SELECT format, COUNT(*) AS count_banned FROM legalities WHERE status = 'Banned' GROUP BY format ORDER BY COUNT(*) DESC LIMIT 1) SELECT T2.format, T1.name FROM cards AS T1 INNER JOIN legalities AS T2 ON T2.uuid = T1.uuid INNER JOIN MaxBanned MB ON MB.format = T2.format WHERE T2.status = 'Banned'

results.question: Which department was the President of the club in?
results.sql: SELECT T2.department FROM member AS T1 INNER JOIN major AS T2 ON T1.link_to_major = T2.major_id WHERE T1.position = 'President'

results.question: How many atoms with iodine and with sulfur type elements are there in single bond molecules?

additional_collections.role: holds bond_type for filtering single bonds
holds bond_type for filtering single bonds

results.sql: SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT CASE WHEN T1.element = 'i' THEN T1.atom_id ELSE NULL END) AS iodine_nums , COUNT(DISTINCT CASE WHEN T1.element = 's' THEN T1.atom_id ELSE NULL END) AS sulfur_nums FROM atom AS T1 INNER JOIN connected AS T2 ON T1.atom_id = T2.atom_id INNER JOIN bond AS T3 ON T2.bond_id = T3.bond_id WHERE T3.bond_type = '-'

results.question: During which lap did Lewis Hamilton take a pit stop during the 2011 Australian Grand Prix?

additional_collections.role: scopes by race (2011 Australian Grand Prix)
scopes by race (2011 Australian Grand Prix)

results.sql: SELECT T1.lap FROM pitStops AS T1 INNER JOIN drivers AS T2 on T1.driverId = T2.driverId INNER JOIN races AS T3 on T1.raceId = T3.raceId WHERE T2.forename = 'Lewis' AND T2.surname = 'Hamilton' AND T3.year = 2011 AND T3.name = 'Australian Grand Prix'

results.question: Was each expense in October Meeting on October 8, 2019 approved?
results.sql: SELECT T3.approved FROM event AS T1 INNER JOIN budget AS T2 ON T1.event_id = T2.link_to_event INNER JOIN expense AS T3 ON T2.budget_id = T3.link_to_budget WHERE T1.event_name = 'October Meeting' AND T1.event_date LIKE '2019-10-08%'

results.question: For the examinations done after 1997/1/1, how many of them have the result of an inactivated partial prothrom bin time?
results.sql: SELECT COUNT(T1.ID) FROM Patient AS T1 INNER JOIN Laboratory AS T2 ON T1.ID = T2.ID WHERE T2.Date > '1997-01-01' AND T2.APTT >= 45

results.question: Is the molecule with the most double bonds carcinogenic?
results.sql: SELECT T1.label FROM molecule AS T1 INNER JOIN ( SELECT T.molecule_id, COUNT(T.bond_type) FROM bond AS T WHERE T.bond_type = '=' GROUP BY T.molecule_id ORDER BY COUNT(T.bond_type) DESC LIMIT 1 ) AS T2 ON T1.molecule_id = T2.molecule_id

results.question: From which post is the most popular tag excerpted from? Please give the body of the post.
results.sql: SELECT Body FROM posts WHERE id = ( SELECT ExcerptPostId FROM tags ORDER BY Count DESC LIMIT 1 )

results.question: Among the superheroes with the race of god/eternal, how many of them are male
results.sql: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM superhero AS T1 INNER JOIN race AS T2 ON T1.race_id = T2.id INNER JOIN gender AS T3 ON T3.id = T1.gender_id WHERE T1.race_id = 21 AND T1.gender_id = 1

results.question: How many schools with an average score in Math greater than 400 in the SAT test are exclusively virtual?
results.sql: SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT T2.School) FROM satscores AS T1 INNER JOIN schools AS T2 ON T1.cds = T2.CDSCode WHERE T2.Virtual = 'F' AND T1.AvgScrMath > 400

results.question: What was the product id of the transaction happened at 2012/8/23 21:20:00?
results.sql: SELECT T1.ProductID FROM transactions_1k AS T1 INNER JOIN gasstations AS T2 ON T1.GasStationID = T2.GasStationID WHERE T1.Date = '2012-08-23' AND T1.Time = '21:20:00'

results.question: What's Bruno Senna's Q1 result in the qualifying race No. 354?
results.sql: SELECT T1.q1 FROM qualifying AS T1 INNER JOIN drivers AS T2 ON T2.driverId = T1.driverId WHERE T1.raceId = 354 AND T2.forename = 'Bruno' AND T2.surname = 'Senna'

results.question: How many 'classic' cards are eligible for loan?

additional_collections.role: holds card type information to determine eligibility
holds card type information to determine eligibility

results.sql: SELECT COUNT(T1.card_id) FROM card AS T1 INNER JOIN disp AS T2 ON T1.disp_id = T2.disp_id WHERE T1.type = 'classic' AND T2.type = 'OWNER'

results.question: For patients with abnormal platelet level, state the number of patients with lower than normal range. How is it compare to the number of patients with higher than normal range?
results.sql: SELECT SUM(CASE WHEN T2.PLT <= 100 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) - SUM(CASE WHEN T2.PLT >= 400 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) FROM Patient AS T1 INNER JOIN Laboratory AS T2 ON T1.ID = T2.ID

results.question: What is Ajax's highest chance creation passing score and what is it classified as?
results.sql: SELECT t2.chanceCreationPassing, t2.chanceCreationPassingClass FROM Team AS t1 INNER JOIN Team_Attributes AS t2 ON t1.team_api_id = t2.team_api_id WHERE t1.team_long_name = 'Ajax' ORDER BY t2.chanceCreationPassing DESC LIMIT 1

results.question: List all travel destinations where the destinationDescription mentions 'popular', count how many destinations have such a description, and group these results by destinationName.

results.sql: SELECT T1.Diagnosis FROM Patient AS T1 INNER JOIN Examination AS T2 ON T1.ID = T2.ID WHERE T1.ID = ( SELECT ID FROM Examination WHERE `Examination Date` = '1997-01-27' AND Diagnosis = 'SLE' ) AND T2.`Examination Date` = T1.`First Date`

results.question: List all the expenses incurred by the vice president.

holds position information to filter for vice president

results.sql: SELECT T2.expense_id, T2.expense_description FROM member AS T1 INNER JOIN expense AS T2 ON T1.member_id = T2.link_to_member WHERE T1.position = 'Vice President'

results.question: Calculate the amount budgeted for 'April Speaker' event. List all the budgeted categories for said event in an ascending order based on their amount budgeted.
results.sql: SELECT T2.category, SUM(T2.amount) FROM event AS T1 JOIN budget AS T2 ON T1.event_id = T2.link_to_event WHERE T1.event_name = 'April Speaker' GROUP BY T2.category ORDER BY SUM(T2.amount) ASC

results.question: What is the most common bond type?
results.sql: SELECT T.bond_type FROM ( SELECT bond_type, COUNT(bond_id) FROM bond GROUP BY bond_type ORDER BY COUNT(bond_id) DESC LIMIT 1 ) AS T

results.sql: SELECT T1.Diagnosis FROM Examination AS T1 INNER JOIN Laboratory AS T2 ON T1.ID = T2.ID WHERE T2.TG < 200 ORDER BY T2.TG DESC LIMIT 1

links transaction to account and client
provides gender information for the client
links transaction to account and client

results.sql: SELECT T4.balance, T1.gender FROM client AS T1 INNER JOIN disp AS T2 ON T1.client_id = T2.client_id INNER JOIN account AS T3 ON T2.account_id =T3.account_id INNER JOIN trans AS T4 ON T3.account_id = T4.account_id WHERE T1.client_id = 4 AND T4.trans_id = 851

results.question: What is the owner user id of the most valuable post?

provides comment data to count unique users

results.sql: SELECT T1.PostHistoryTypeId, (SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT UserId) FROM comments WHERE PostId = 3720) AS NumberOfUsers FROM postHistory AS T1 WHERE T1.PostId = 3720

results.question: What is the biggest monthly consumption of the customers who use euro as their currency?

results.sql: SELECT T1.ID, T2.`T-CHO` FROM Patient AS T1 INNER JOIN Laboratory AS T2 ON T1.ID = T2.ID ORDER BY T2.`T-CHO` DESC, T1.Birthday ASC LIMIT 1

results.question: What is the name and major of members who had to spend more than a hundred dollars on an expense?
results.sql: SELECT DISTINCT T1.first_name, T1.last_name, T2.major_name FROM member AS T1 INNER JOIN major AS T2 ON T2.major_id = T1.link_to_major INNER JOIN expense AS T3 ON T1.member_id = T3.link_to_member WHERE T3.cost > 100

results.question: For accounts in 1993 with statement issued after transaction, list the account ID, district name and district region.
results.sql: SELECT T1.account_id, T2.A2, T2.A3 FROM account AS T1 INNER JOIN district AS T2 ON T1.district_id = T2.district_id WHERE T1.frequency = 'POPLATEK PO OBRATU' AND STRFTIME('%Y', T1.date)= '1993'

results.question: In the 2015–2016 season, how many games were played in the Italian Serie A league?

additional_collections.role: holds league name to filter by Italian Serie A
holds league name to filter by Italian Serie A

results.sql: SELECT COUNT(t2.id) FROM League AS t1 INNER JOIN Match AS t2 ON t1.id = t2.league_id WHERE t1.name = 'Italy Serie A' AND t2.season = '2015/2016'

results.question: Find all clinics where the description contains the keyword 'specialty', group them by their acceptingNewPatients status, and calculate the maximum averagePatientSatisfaction score for each group.
How many players had the highest potential score for crossing that preferred to use their left foots while attacking?
results.sql: SELECT COUNT(t1.id) FROM Player_Attributes AS t1 WHERE t1.preferred_foot = 'left' AND t1.crossing = ( SELECT MAX(crossing) FROM Player_Attributes)

results.question: Paul di Resta was in the No. 853 race, what percent faster did he finish in the 853rd race than the next race for the fastest lap speed?

additional_collections.role: to identify Paul di Resta by forename and surname
to get fastestLapSpeed for raceId 853 and 854
to identify Paul di Resta by forename and surname
to get fastestLapSpeed for raceId 853 and 854

results.sql: SELECT (SUM(IIF(T2.raceId = 853, T2.fastestLapSpeed, 0)) - SUM(IIF(T2.raceId = 854, T2.fastestLapSpeed, 0))) * 100 / SUM(IIF(T2.raceId = 853, T2.fastestLapSpeed, 0)) FROM drivers AS T1 INNER JOIN results AS T2 ON T2.driverId = T1.driverId WHERE T1.forename = 'Paul' AND T1.surname = 'di Resta'

results.question: How many of the molecules are not carcinogenic?
results.sql: SELECT COUNT(T.molecule_id) FROM molecule AS T WHERE T.label = '-'

results.question: In how many atoms is there no bromine?
results.sql: SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT T.atom_id) FROM atom AS T WHERE T.element <> 'br'

results.question: Find clinics where acceptingNewPatients is equal to true.
List exhibitions with cultural themes in their exhibitionDescription that have an averageVisitorCount greater than 100, and summarize how many of these exhibitions are currentlyRunning.
Find doctors with expertise related to dermatology and skin care, who have at least 10 years of experience, and retrieve the top 3 most common doctor names.
What is the display name of the user who has the most number of views?
results.sql: SELECT DisplayName FROM users WHERE Views = ( SELECT MAX(Views) FROM users )

results.question: In Scotland Premier League, which away team won the most during the 2010 season?
results.sql: SELECT teamInfo.team_long_name FROM League AS leagueData INNER JOIN Match AS matchData ON leagueData.id = matchData.league_id INNER JOIN Team AS teamInfo ON matchData.away_team_api_id = teamInfo.team_api_id WHERE leagueData.name = 'Scotland Premier League' AND matchData.season = '2009/2010' AND matchData.away_team_goal - matchData.home_team_goal > 0 GROUP BY matchData.away_team_api_id ORDER BY COUNT(*) DESC LIMIT 1

results.question: Find the types of cuisines mentioned most frequently in the restaurant descriptions, grouped by whether the restaurants are currently open or closed.
List out top 10 Spanish drivers who were born before 1982 and have the latest lap time.
results.sql: SELECT T2.driverId FROM pitStops AS T1 INNER JOIN drivers AS T2 on T1.driverId = T2.driverId WHERE T2.nationality = 'Spanish' AND STRFTIME('%Y', T2.dob) < '1982' ORDER BY T1.time DESC LIMIT 10

results.question: How many events did the member with the phone number "954-555-6240" attend?
results.sql: SELECT COUNT(T2.link_to_event) FROM member AS T1 INNER JOIN attendance AS T2 ON T1.member_id = T2.link_to_member WHERE T1.phone = '954-555-6240'

results.question: For all patients with triglyceride (TG) level beyond the normal range, how many are age more than 50 years?

additional_collections.role: provides birthday information to calculate age
provides birthday information to calculate age

results.sql: SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT T1.ID) FROM Patient AS T1 INNER JOIN Laboratory AS T2 ON T1.ID = T2.ID WHERE T2.TG >= 200 AND STRFTIME('%Y', CURRENT_TIMESTAMP) - STRFTIME('%Y', T1.Birthday) > 50

results.question: Identify clinics that provide cardiology services (using descriptions for search), determine which of them are currently accepting new patients, and count the number of clinics within each range of average patient satisfaction scores.
What does the person with the phone number "809-555-3360" major in?
results.sql: SELECT T2.major_name FROM member AS T1 INNER JOIN major AS T2 ON T1.link_to_major = T2.major_id WHERE T1.phone = '809-555-3360'

results.question: What is the total amount of Community College District closure in 1989 in the city of San Francisco?
results.sql: SELECT COUNT(School) FROM schools WHERE strftime('%Y', ClosedDate) = '1989' AND City = 'San Francisco' AND DOCType = 'Community College District'

results.question: Calculate the total atoms consisting of the element carbon and hydrogen.
results.sql: SELECT COUNT(T.atom_id) FROM atom AS T WHERE T.element = 'c' OR T.element = 'h'

results.question: Give me the molecule ID of the double bond type.
results.sql: SELECT DISTINCT T.molecule_id FROM bond AS T WHERE T.bond_type = '='

results.question: What are the rulings for the card named and designed by Kev Walker? List them in descending order of dates.
results.sql: SELECT T2.text FROM cards AS T1 INNER JOIN rulings AS T2 ON T2.uuid = T1.uuid WHERE T1.artist = 'Kev Walker' ORDER BY T2.date DESC

results.question: How many income are received with an amount of 50?
results.sql: SELECT COUNT(income_id) FROM income WHERE amount = 50

results.question: Find restaurants that have a romantic ambiance using search query, filter the results to include only those where the name contains 'Ristorante', and count the number of these restaurants using the averageRating property.
Find cozy Italian restaurants that are currently open, and group them by their name.
What is the percentage of female patient had total protein not within the normal range?
results.sql: SELECT CAST(SUM(CASE WHEN T1.SEX = 'F' AND (T2.TP < 6.0 OR T2.TP > 8.5) THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS REAL) * 100 / COUNT(*) FROM Patient AS T1 INNER JOIN Laboratory AS T2 ON T1.ID = T2.ID WHERE T1.SEX = 'F'
